explanation_en: Both a “receipt on discharge of a charge” and a “de ed of release” of the Mortgage indicate that the Mortgage has been fully repaid and discharged. Hence options (i) and (ii) are correct choices. A “transfer of mortgage” transfers the Mortgage fro m one mortgagee to another, but the Mortgage stays in force. Hence, option (iii ) is not a correct choice. In light of the above, the answer is C.
explanation_cn: 「解除押記收據 」 及 「解除按揭契據 」 均顯示有關按揭已完全清還及被解除 。 因此，選項(i) 及(ii) 均屬正確 。 而「轉讓按揭 」只是把有關按揭由一個承按人轉給另一個 ，有關按揭仍屬有 效。 基於上述原因 ，答案是C。

question_en: David instructed Carol, a salesperson, to act f or him in the purchase of a property which is a flat on the first floor of a building. H e told Carol that he intended to use the property as his new residence. Carol arranged f or David to enter into a provisional agreement for sale and purchase of the property with the vendor. Later, David’s lawyer advised David that the permitted use of all the flats on the first floor was for non-domestic use. In the circumstance s, which of the following statements is NOT CORRECT ?
question_cn: 戴偉委託營業員嘉露購買一個位於某大廈一樓的單位 。他告訴嘉露會以此作 為其新居 。嘉露安排戴偉與賣方訂立了一份該單位的臨時買賣合約 。其後， 戴偉的律師向他指出 ，整層一樓的單位只許用作非住宅用途 。在此情 況下， 以下哪項陳述並 不正確？

options_en.A: The approval of the Lands Department is required for the change of the permitted use of the property.
options_en.B: The title of the property may be defecti ve if there is unauthorised change in the use of the property.
options_en.C: The use of the property as a residence may breac h the Buildings Ordinance.
options_en.D: Carol might have breached her duty to David for failing to check the permitted use of the property.
options_en.E: Carol should have advised David not to purchase the property.

options_cn.A: 要更改該單位的許可 用途、必須取得地政總署的批准
options_cn.B: 該單位的業權可能因存在未經批准的更改物業用途而欠妥
options_cn.C: 該單位用作住宅可能會違反 《建築物條例 》
options_cn.D: 嘉露有可能因為沒有查核該單位的許可用途而違反了她對戴偉的責任
options_cn.E: 嘉露應建議戴偉不要購入該單位

explanation_en: According to section 25 of the Buildings Ordinance - “(1) One month’s notice in the specified form shall be given to the Building Authority of any intended material change in the us e of a building by the person intending to carry out or authorising the carrying out of such change. (Amended 68 of 1993 s. 14)”. Hence, choice A is incorrect as the application for changes in user should be submitted to the Building Authority instead. Choice B is correct since changing the permitted us e(s) of a building without prior approval of the Building Authority could cont ravene the Building Ordinance and/or the land lease conditions, giving rise to enforcement action including Government re-entry. Such a breach can re nder the title of the property defective. Choice C is correct pursuant to section 25 of the B uildings Ordinance, as change in use of buildings may breach the Buildings Ordina nce. Pursuant to sections 36(1)(a)(i) and (ii) of the Es tate Agents Ordinance, Carol should possess prescribed information of the proper ty including permitted use of the property, and be reasonably satisfied as to the accuracy of the information. Hence, choice D is also correct. SQE As David told Carol that he intended to use the pro perty as his new residence, Carol should have advised David to purchase a resid ential property instead. Hence, E is also correct. In light of the above, the answer is A.
explanation_cn: 根據《建築物條例 》第25(1) 條，如建築物的用途擬有重大更改 ，則擬作出 該項更改或授權作出該項更改的人 ，須以指明的表格給予建築事務監督一個 月通知。因此，答案A並不正確 ，因為更改 用途須取得建築事務監督 而不 是地政總署的批准 。 未經建築事務監督 批准更改物業 的許可用途，可能違反 《建築物條例 》及/ 或土地契約條款 ，導致有關政府部門採取法律行動 ，包括政府收回物業 。此 違反可令物業的業權欠妥 。因此，答案B是正確的 。 根據《建築物條例 》 第25 條，建築物用途的更改可能會違反 《建築物條例 》， 因此答案C是正確的 。 根據《地產代理 條例》第36(1)(a)(i) 及(ii) 條，嘉露須管有訂明資料 包括單位 用途，並須確保自己能信納其準確性 。故此，答案D是正確的 。 由於戴偉已告訴嘉露 ，他會以單位作為其新居 ，因此嘉露應建議戴偉購買另 一個住宅單位而非該單位 。因此答案 E是正確的 。 基於上述原因 ，本題的答案是 A。

question_en: Which of the following is/are the duty/duties o f an owners’ corporation of a building? (i) Keep the common parts of the building in good c ondition. (ii) Carry out such works in respect of the common parts of the building as ordered by the relevant Government authorities. (iii) Enforce obligations contained in the deed of mutual covenant for the management of the building.
question_cn: 以下哪項 /些是大廈的業主立案法團的職責 ？ (i) 使大廈公用部份維持在一個保養良好的狀態 (ii) 遵照有關政府機構就大廈公用部份發出的指令 ，進行規定的工 程 (iii) 執行大廈公契列載的管理大廈的責任
explanation_en: Section 18(1) of the Building Management Ordinance provides that: (1) The owners’ corporation shall- (a) maintain the common parts and the property of t he corporation in a state of good and serviceable repair and clean cond ition; (b) carry out such work as may be ordered or requir ed in respect of the common parts by any public officer or public body i n exercise of the powers conferred by any Ordinance; (c) do all things reasonably necessary for the enfo rcement of the obligations contained in the deed of mutual covenan t (if any) for the control, management and administration of the build ing. Hence, all the options are correct and the answer i s E.
explanation_cn: 根據《建築物 管理條例》第18(1) 條， (1) 法團須 —— (a) 使公用部分和法團財產維持良好合用的狀況 ，並保持清潔 ； (b) 在公職人員或公共機構行使任何條例所賦權力 ，命令或要求就公 用部分進行某項工作時 ，遵照辦理 ； (c) 採取一切合理必需的措施 ，以執行公契 (如有的話 ) 載明有關建 築物的控制 、管理、行政事宜的責任 。 因此，所有選項均屬正確 ，而答案是 E。

question_en: Which of the following documents would contain information as to which parts of a building are common areas? (i) the deed of mutual covenant of the building (ii) the Government lease relating to the building (iii) the certificate of compliance relating to the build ing
question_cn: 以下哪項 /些文件會載有大廈哪些部份屬公用地方的資料 ？ (i) 該大廈的大廈公契 (ii) 與該大廈有關的政府租契 (iii) 與該大廈有關的 「合格證明書 」(俗稱「滿意紙 」)
explanation_en: The Deed of Mutual Covenant provides for the manage ment of the building and maintenance of the common parts. Hence, option (i) is a correct choice. The Government lease is usually granted before the building was constructed on the lot to which the lease relates, and contains pr ovisions regarding the lot rather than the building. Hence, option (ii) is not a corr ect choice. The certificate of compliance relating to the build ing is evidence that the conditions of the land grant whereupon the building is erected have been complied with. Hence, it is not related to the comm on areas of the building and option (iii) is not a correct choice. In light of the above, the answer is A.
explanation_cn: 大廈公契就樓宇的管理以及公用地方的維修保養作出規定 ，因此，選項(i) 是正確的 。 政府租契一般會在 座落於其地段上的 大廈興建前 已批出，包含有關該地段 (而非建於其上的大廈 ) 的條款。因此，選項(ii) 並不正確 。 合格證明書 (俗稱「滿意紙 」) 是證明大廈所在地段的租契上的條款已被 遵 從的文件 ，並不涉及大廈的公用地方 。因此，選項(iii) 並不正確 。 基於上述原因 ，正確答案是A。

question_en: Under Part IV of the Landlord and Tenant (Conso lidation) Ordinance, which of the following is/are the implied covenant(s) in a domes tic tenancy, a breach of which by the tenant may constitute a ground for forfeitur e of the tenancy? (i) Not to make any structural alteration to the flat w ithout the landlord’s consent. (ii) Not to keep pets in the flat. (iii) To pay rent within 15 days of the date when the ren t falls due.
question_cn: 根據《業主與租客 (綜合) 條例》第IV 部，以下哪項 /些是住宅租賃的隱含 契諾，在租客違反該 (等)契諾時，可構成沒收租賃權的理據 ？ (i) 不得在未經業主同意下對單位作出任何結構上的改動 (ii) 不得在單位內飼養寵物 (iii) 租金須於繳交租金到期日的十五天內繳交
explanation_en: Under Part IV of the Landlord and Tenant (Consolida tion) Ordinance, a breach of the following implied covenants by the tenant ma y constitute a ground for forfeiture of the tenancy: - non-payment of the rent within 15 days of the due date; - use, or suffer or permit the use of, the premises or any part thereof for an immoral or illegal purpose; - causing unnecessary annoyance, inconvenience or d isturbance to the landlord or to any other person; - making any structural alteration to, or suffer or permit any structural alteration to, the premises without the prior writt en consent of the landlord. There is no provision in the Ordinance that prohibi ts keeping pets in the premises. Hence, options (i) and (iii) are correct whereas op tion (ii) is not, and the answer is C.
explanation_cn: 根據《業主與租客 (綜合) 條例》第IV 部，在租客違反以下契諾時 ，可構 成沒收租賃權的理據 ： - 有租金沒有在到期日的 15 天內繳交 ； - 將該處所或其任何部分用作或容受或准許該處所或其任何部分被用作不 道德或非法用途 ； - 對業主或任何其他人造成不必要的煩擾 、不便或騷擾 ； - 未經業主事先書面同意而對該處所作出結構上的改動或容受或准許該等 結構上的改動 。 條例並無任何條文禁止飼養寵物 。 因此，選項(i) 及(iii) 均屬正確而選項 (ii) 並不正確 。基於上述原因 ，答案是C。

question_en: Which of the following are matters that an esta te agent should attend to when handling the sub-letting of a property? (i) Find out if the principal tenancy agreement pro hibits sub-letting. (ii) Inform the Land Registry of the sub-letting. (iii) If the principal tenancy agreement prohibits sub- letting, request the principal tenant to produce proof of the landlord’s consent to the sub-letting. (iv) Ensure that the term of the sub- tenancy does not exceed the term of the principal tenancy.
question_cn: 地產代理在處理委託分租物業時 ，應注意下列哪些事宜 ？ (i) 查清楚原租約是否禁止分租 (ii) 通知土地註冊處有關分租事宜 (iii) 若原租約禁止分租 ，要求二房東出示業主同意分租的證明 (iv) 確保分租租賃的租期不可超越原租約的租期
explanation_en: According to Practice Circular No. 01-09 (CR), esta te agents handling subletting properties should pay attention to the following: (1) Review the tenancy agreement between the princi pal landlord and the principal tenant to see if there is any restriction on subletting and whether prior consent for subletting has to be obtained fro m the principal landlord; (2) The terms of the sub-tenancy agreement between the principal tenant and the sub-tenant shall be subject to the terms of the tenancy agreement between the principal landlord and the principal te nant. The tenancy period under the sub-tenancy agreement shall not exceed th at under the original tenancy agreement. Hence, options (i), (iii) and (iv) are correct. Opt ion (ii) is not a requirement by law or stipulated in the Practice Circular. In light of the above, the answer is D.
explanation_cn: 根據「執業通告 」第01-09 (CR) ，地產代理在處理分租物業時 ，應注意以下 事宜： (1) 應取得大業主與二房東之間的租約並審視有否分租限制 ，或須否先取得 大業主同意才可作分租 ； (2) 應留意二房東與三房客之間的分租租約條款不得與大業主與二房東之 間的租約條款有所衝突 ，分租租期也不可超過原有租期 因此，選項(i) 、(iii) 及(iv) 均屬正確 。選項(ii) 並不是法律上或 「執業通告 」內 註明的要求。 基於上述原因 ，答案是D。

question_en: Mike holds a salesperson’s licence and has enter ed the estate agency trade for three years. He is now 22 years old. He has recentl y applied for the post of manager offered by Excellence Estate Agency Limited (“Excellence Estate Agency”) which needs to appoint a manager for the e ffective and separate control of the business of its branch office in com pliance with the Estate Agents Ordinance. Excellence Estate Agency informed Mike s ubsequently that according to the Estate Agents Ordinance, he was no t qualified for the post. Which of the following is probably the reason?
question_cn: Mike持有營業員牌照，已入行三年，現年22歲。他最近申請了卓越地產代理有限公司（「卓越地產代理」）的經理職位，該公司需要委任一名經理，以符合《地產代理條例》的規定，有效及獨立地控制其分行的業務。卓越地產代理其後通知Mike，根據《地產代理條例》，他不符合該職位的資格。以下哪項可能是原因？

options_en.A: Mike is not a university graduate.
options_en.B: Mike has less than five years’ experience in the trade.
options_en.C: Mike has not reached the age of 25.
options_en.D: Mike is not a partner of Excellence Estate Agenc y.
options_en.E: Mike is not a holder of an estate agent’s licenc e.

options_cn.D: Mike並非卓越地產代理的合夥人。
options_cn.E: Mike並非地產代理（個人）牌照持有人。

explanation_en: Under Section 38 of the Estate Agents Ordinance, the manager appointed for the effective and separate control of a branch office must hold an estate agent's (individual) licence. Mike only holds a salesperson's licence, which does not qualify him for the manager position. There is no requirement for a university degree, minimum age of 25, five years' experience, or partnership status.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第38條，獲委任以有效及獨立地控制分行業務的經理必須持有地產代理（個人）牌照。Mike僅持有營業員牌照，不符合擔任經理職位的資格。條例並無要求大學學位、年滿25歲、五年經驗或合夥人身份。

question_en: According to the definition of “advertisement” i n the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following is/are advertisement(s)? (i) a poster containing residential properties for sale, displayed in the Central MTR station (ii) a price list of residential properties for sal e, published in a newspaper (iii) a leaflet containing residential properties f or sale/lease, inserted into the mail boxes of a residential building
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》中「廣告」的定義，以下哪些屬於廣告？
(i) 在中環港鐵站展示的一張載有住宅物業出售資料的海報
(ii) 在報章刊登的一份住宅物業出售價目表
(iii) 投入住宅大廈信箱內的一份載有住宅物業出售／出租資料的傳單
explanation_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, 'advertisement' is defined very broadly to include any form of advertising or promotion, whether by publication, display, distribution or otherwise. A poster in an MTR station, a price list in a newspaper, and a leaflet inserted into mail boxes all fall within this broad definition. Therefore all three items (i), (ii) and (iii) are advertisements.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，「廣告」的定義非常廣泛，包括任何形式的宣傳或推廣，不論是以刊登、展示、派發或其他方式。港鐵站的海報、報章上的價目表及投入信箱的傳單均屬於此廣泛定義範圍。因此(i)、(ii)及(iii)均屬於廣告。

question_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance and the Practi ce Regulation, an estate agent who has entered into an estate agency agreement wit h the vendor of a residential property is required to have in his possession whic h of the following information relating to the property? (i) the unexpired term of the relevant government l ease (ii) the year of completion (iii) the user
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》及《常規規例》，地產代理與住宅物業的賣方訂立地產代理協議後，須管有下列哪些有關該物業的資料？
(i) 相關政府租契的未届滿年期
(ii) 落成年份
(iii) 用途
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation (Section 3 and Schedule 1, Form 1 - Property Information Form), an estate agent acting for the vendor of a residential property is required to have information including the unexpired term of the government lease, the year of completion, and the user (permitted use) of the property. All three items are required property information.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》（第3條及附表1，表格1——物業資料表格），代表住宅物業賣方的地產代理須管有物業資料，包括政府租契的未届滿年期、落成年份及用途。三項均為須備有的物業資料。

question_en: Which of the following is/are specified as a cri minal offence(s) under the Estate Agents Ordinance? (i) any licensed estate agent or licensed salespers on who, without reasonable excuse, for or in connection with an est ate agency business, uses any name other than the name specifi ed in his licence (ii) any person who, without reasonable excuse, fur nishes misleading information to the investigator appointed under the Estate Agents Ordinance in relation to an investigation carried o ut by the Estate Agents Authority (iii) any licensed estate agent who, without reason able excuse, issues an advertisement before obtaining the vendor’s written consent
question_cn:
以下哪些在《地產代理條例》下被列為刑事罪行？
(i) 任何持牌地產代理或持牌營業員，無合理辯解而在地產代理業務中或就地產代理業務使用其牌照所指明的名稱以外的任何名稱
(ii) 任何人無合理辯解，就地產代理監管局根據《地產代理條例》進行的調查，向獲委任的調查員提供具誤導性的資料
(iii) 任何持牌地產代理，無合理辯解而在取得賣方書面同意前發出廣告
explanation_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, using a name other than that specified in one's licence (Section 44) and furnishing misleading information to an investigator (Section 30) are both specified as criminal offences. However, issuing an advertisement without the vendor's written consent is a breach of the Practice Regulation which may lead to disciplinary action, but is not itself a criminal offence under the EAO.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，使用牌照所指明名稱以外的名稱（第44條）及向調查員提供具誤導性的資料（第30條）均被列為刑事罪行。然而，未取得賣方書面同意前發出廣告屬違反《常規規例》，可能導致紀律處分，但本身並非《地產代理條例》下的刑事罪行。

question_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following is a duty owed by an estate agent to his client in respect of the sale a nd purchase of a residential property in relation to which he has entered into a n estate agency agreement?
question_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，就已訂立地產代理協議的住宅物業買賣而言，地產代理對其客戶負有的責任包括以下哪一項？

options_en.A: To recommend a solicitor to the client to act fo r the client in the sale and purchase.
options_en.B: To introduce a mortgagee bank to the client.
options_en.C: To assist the client in taking out insurance on the property.
options_en.D: To disclose to the client full particulars of an y pecuniary or other beneficial interest which the estate agent has in t he property.
options_en.E: To advise the client to instruct a surveyor to conduct a valuation of the property.

options_cn.A: 向客戶推薦一名律師，在買賣中代表客戶行事。
options_cn.B: 向客戶介紹一間承造按揭的銀行。
options_cn.C: 協助客戶就物業投購保險。
options_cn.D: 向客戶披露地產代理在該物業中擁有的任何金錢上或其他實益利益的全部詳情。
options_cn.E: 建議客戶委託測量師對物業進行估價。

explanation_en: Under Section 36 of the Estate Agents Ordinance, an estate agent owes a duty to his client to disclose full particulars of any pecuniary or other beneficial interest which the estate agent has in the property. The other options (recommending a solicitor, introducing a bank, assisting with insurance, advising on valuation) are not duties specified under the EAO.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第36條，地產代理有責任向其客戶披露地產代理在該物業中擁有的任何金錢上或其他實益利益的全部詳情。其他選項（推薦律師、介紹銀行、協助投保、建議估價）均非《地產代理條例》所訂明的責任。

question_en: Anna is an undischarged bankrupt. Eighteen month s ago, Ben was convicted of conspiracy to defraud a bank, contrary to the Theft Ordinance, and sentenced to imprisonment for one year. Ten years ago, Carol was convicted and fined for careless driving causing a minor traffic accident, contrary to the Road Traffic Ordinance. Which of them may not be considered to b e a “fit and proper person” to hold a salesperson’s licence or an estate agent’ s licence under the Estate Agents Ordinance? (i) Anna (ii) Ben (iii) Carol
question_cn:
Anna是未獲解除破產的破產人。十八個月前，Ben因串謀詐騙銀行（違反《盜竊罪條例》）被定罪，並被判處監禁一年。十年前，Carol因不小心駕駛引致輕微交通意外（違反《道路交通條例》）被定罪及罰款。根據《地產代理條例》，他們當中哪些人可能不被視為持有營業員牌照或地產代理牌照的「適當人選」？
(i) Anna
(ii) Ben
(iii) Carol
explanation_en: Under Section 19(2) of the Estate Agents Ordinance, factors for determining whether a person is 'fit and proper' include being an undischarged bankrupt and having been convicted of an offence involving fraud or dishonesty. Anna is an undischarged bankrupt and Ben was convicted of conspiracy to defraud (a dishonesty offence). Carol's careless driving conviction is a minor traffic offence not involving dishonesty, so it would not affect her fitness.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第19(2)條，判斷一個人是否「適當人選」的因素包括是否為未獲解除破產的破產人，以及是否曾因涉及欺詐或不誠實的罪行被定罪。Anna是未獲解除破產的破產人，Ben因串謀詐騙（不誠實罪行）被定罪。Carol的不小心駕駛定罪屬輕微交通違規，不涉及不誠實，因此不影響其資格。

question_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following statements is/are correct? (i) Only a holder of an estate agent’s licence (ind ividual) is required to disclose to a client any beneficial interest he has in a property. (ii) The manager appointed for the effective and se parate control of the business of an estate agency office in compliance w ith the Estate Agents Ordinance must be a holder of an estate agen t’s licence (individual). (iii) Only a holder of an estate agent’s licence (i ndividual) is allowed to sign the prescribed estate agency agreement on beha lf of the estate agency.
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》，以下哪些陳述是正確的？
(i) 只有地產代理（個人）牌照持有人才須向客戶披露其在物業中的實益利益。
(ii) 根據《地產代理條例》獲委任以有效及獨立地控制地產代理營業處業務的經理，必須為地產代理（個人）牌照持有人。
(iii) 只有地產代理（個人）牌照持有人才可代表地產代理公司簽署訂明的地產代理協議。
explanation_en: Under Section 38 of the EAO, the manager for effective and separate control must hold an estate agent's (individual) licence — statement (ii) is correct. Statement (i) is incorrect because both estate agents and salespersons have a duty to disclose beneficial interests under Section 36. Statement (iii) is incorrect because a salesperson can also sign the prescribed estate agency agreement on behalf of the estate agency company.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第38條，獲委任以有效及獨立地控制業務的經理必須持有地產代理（個人）牌照——陳述(ii)正確。陳述(i)不正確，因為根據第36條，地產代理及營業員均有責任披露實益利益。陳述(iii)不正確，因為營業員亦可代表地產代理公司簽署訂明的地產代理協議。

question_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance and the Licens ing Regulation, which of the following are among the requirements that an applic ant has to fulfil in order to be eligible to be granted a salesperson’s licence? (i) He has to pass the relevant qualifying examinat ion within six months immediately before the date of his applicati on for the licence. (ii) He has attained the age of 18 at the date of h is application for the licence. (iii) He is a fit and proper person to hold a sales person’s licence. (iv) He has completed the educational level of Form 5 of secondary education or its equivalent.
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》及《發牌規例》，申請人須符合以下哪些要求，方可獲發營業員牌照？
(i) 須在申請牌照日期前六個月內通過相關的資格考試。
(ii) 在申請牌照之日已年滿18歲。
(iii) 是持有營業員牌照的適當人選。
(iv) 已完成中學五年級教育程度或同等學歷。
explanation_en: Under the EAO and Licensing Regulation (Section 10 of the Licensing Regulation), to obtain a salesperson's licence, the applicant must have attained age 18, be a fit and proper person, and have completed Form 5 education or equivalent. The qualifying examination must be passed within 12 months (not 6 months) before the application date, so statement (i) is incorrect.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》及《發牌規例》（《發牌規例》第10條），申請營業員牌照的人須年滿18歲、為適當人選，以及已完成中學五年級教育或同等學歷。資格考試須在申請日期前12個月（而非6個月）內通過，因此陳述(i)不正確。

question_en: Kelly’s salesperson’s licence will expire on 21 March 2014. If she wishes to renew her licence and continue to do estate agency work as a salesperson immediately after 21 March 2014, according to the L icensing Regulation, she should apply for the renewal of her licence:
question_cn: Kelly的營業員牌照將於2014年3月21日届滿。如她希望續牌並在2014年3月21日後立即繼續以營業員身份從事地產代理工作，根據《發牌規例》，她應於何時申請續牌：

options_en.B: within one month after receiving notification fr om the Estate Agents Authority.
options_en.D: not earlier than 22 September 2013 and not later than 21 February 2014.
options_en.E: not earlier than 22 December 2013 and not later than 21 February

options_cn.A: 在2014年3月21日之前的任何時間。
options_cn.B: 在收到地產代理監管局通知後一個月內。
options_cn.D: 不早於2013年9月22日且不遲於2014年2月21日。
options_cn.E: 不早於2013年12月22日且不遲於2014年2月21日。

explanation_en: Under Section 14 of the Licensing Regulation, an application for renewal of a licence must be made not earlier than 6 months and not later than 1 month before the expiry date. Kelly's licence expires on 21 March 2014, so the renewal application must be made not earlier than 22 September 2013 (6 months before) and not later than 21 February 2014 (1 month before).
explanation_cn: 根據《發牌規例》第14條，續牌申請須在牌照届滿日期前不早於6個月及不遲於1個月提出。Kelly的牌照於2014年3月21日届滿，因此續牌申請須不早於2013年9月22日（届滿前6個月）及不遲於2014年2月21日（届滿前1個月）提出。

question_en: Which of the following is a provision/are provi sions in the Code of Ethics issued by the Estate Agents Authority? (i) Estate agents and salespersons shall, in the co urse of business, provide services to clients with honesty, fidelity and integrity. (ii) Estate agents and salespersons should avoid an y practice which may bring discredit and/or disrepute to the estate agen cy trade. (iii) Estate agents and salespersons shall, in fulf illing their duties, exercise due care and due diligence.
question_cn:
以下哪些是地產代理監管局發出的《操守守則》的條文？
(i) 地產代理及營業員在業務過程中，須以誠實、忠誠及正直的態度向客戶提供服務。
(ii) 地產代理及營業員應避免任何可能令地產代理行業蒙受損害及／或聲譽受損的行為。
(iii) 地產代理及營業員在履行職責時，須恪盡謹慎及盡職的責任。
explanation_en: All three statements are provisions in the Code of Ethics issued by the Estate Agents Authority. The Code requires licensees to provide services with honesty, fidelity and integrity (paragraph 3.2.1); to avoid practices that may bring discredit to the trade (paragraph 3.1.1); and to exercise due care and due diligence in fulfilling duties (paragraph 3.3.1).
explanation_cn: 三項陳述均為地產代理監管局發出的《操守守則》的條文。《操守守則》要求持牌人以誠實、忠誠及正直的態度提供服務（第3.2.1段）；避免任何可能令行業蒙受損害的行為（第3.1.1段）；以及在履行職責時恪盡謹慎及盡職的責任（第3.3.1段）。

question_en: Mr. Wong was a purchaser client of ABC Estate Agency (“ABC”). He intended to purchase a residential property listed at ABC. S ince Mr. Wong was concerned about whether any person had died at the property, he enquired about it with Stephen, a salesperson of ABC. Although Stephen kne w that a former occupier had died at the property, he told Mr. Wong that the re had been no such incident. Which of the following statements is/are correct? (i) Stephen might have breached his duty as a sales person by making a misrepresentation. (ii) Stephen might have breached the Code of Ethics by providing service to his client while he had insider knowledg e of special incidents about the property. (iii) Stephen might have breached the Code of Ethic s by failing to provide service to his client with honesty, fidelit y and integrity.
question_cn:
黃先生是ABC地產代理（「ABC」）的買方客戶。他擬購買ABC放盤的一個住宅物業。由於黃先生關注該物業是否曾有人在內死亡，他向ABC的營業員Stephen查詢。雖然Stephen知道該物業的前住客曾在單位內死亡，但他告訴黃先生並無此事。以下哪些陳述是正確的？
(i) Stephen可能違反了營業員的責任，作出了失實陳述。
(ii) Stephen可能違反了《操守守則》，在知悉物業的特殊事件的情況下仍向客戶提供服務。
(iii) Stephen可能違反了《操守守則》，未能以誠實、忠誠及正直的態度向客戶提供服務。
explanation_en: Stephen made a misrepresentation by lying about the death at the property, breaching his duty as a salesperson — statement (i) is correct. He also breached the Code of Ethics by failing to provide service with honesty, fidelity and integrity — statement (iii) is correct. Statement (ii) is incorrect because having knowledge of special incidents does not in itself breach the Code; the breach arises from the dishonest concealment, not from having the knowledge.
explanation_cn: Stephen就物業內曾有人死亡一事說謊，構成失實陳述，違反了營業員的責任——陳述(i)正確。他亦違反了《操守守則》，未能以誠實、忠誠及正直的態度提供服務——陳述(iii)正確。陳述(ii)不正確，因為僅僅知悉特殊事件本身並不違反《操守守則》；違規源於不誠實的隱瞞，而非知悉該事件本身。

question_en: According to the guidelines in the Practice Cir cular regarding the maintenance of order at first sale sites, salespersons and estate agents should refrain from which of the following activities? (i) Intercepting vehicles. (ii) Distributing promotional pamphlets to prospect ive purchasers. (iii) Putting up banners in public places.
question_cn:
根據執業通告有關在一手樓盤銷售點維持秩序的指引，營業員及地產代理應避免以下哪些活動？
(i) 截停車輛。
(ii) 向準買家派發宣傳單張。
(iii) 在公眾地方懸掛橫額。
explanation_en: According to the EAA Practice Circular on maintaining order at first sale sites, salespersons and estate agents should refrain from intercepting vehicles, distributing promotional pamphlets, and putting up banners in public places. All three activities (i), (ii) and (iii) are prohibited as they may cause nuisance and disorder at first sale sites.
explanation_cn: 根據地產代理監管局有關在一手樓盤銷售點維持秩序的執業通告，營業員及地產代理應避免截停車輛、派發宣傳單張及在公眾地方懸掛橫額。三項活動(i)、(ii)及(iii)均屬應避免的行為，因為可能在一手樓盤銷售點造成滋擾及混亂。

question_en: Under the Practice Regulation, which of the fol lowing is/are the duty/duties of the purchaser’s estate agent in relation to the ins pection of property? (i) to accompany the purchaser in the inspection (ii) to obtain the vendor’s consent before arrangin g the inspection (iii) to compile and supply to the purchaser an inv entory of the furniture in the property before the inspection
question_cn:
根據《常規規例》，就驗樓而言，以下哪些是買方地產代理的責任？
(i) 陪同買方驗樓
(ii) 在安排驗樓前取得賣方同意
(iii) 在驗樓前編製物業内傢俬的清單並提供給買方
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation (Section 4), the purchaser's estate agent has the duty to accompany the purchaser in the inspection of the property and to obtain the vendor's consent before arranging the inspection. Compiling an inventory of furniture is not a prescribed duty. Therefore statements (i) and (ii) are correct.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》（第4條），買方地產代理有責任陪同買方驗樓，並在安排驗樓前取得賣方同意。編製傢俬清單並非訂明的責任。因此陳述(i)及(ii)正確。

question_en: Under the Practice Regulation, an estate agent must enter into an estate agency agreement with his client, using the prescribed for m, in which of the following situations? (i) the sale of a residential flat in the secondary market (ii) the sale of a car parking space (iii) the first sale of a residential flat
question_cn:
根據《常規規例》，地產代理在以下哪些情況下，須使用訂明表格與客戶訂立地產代理協議？
(i) 二手住宅物業的買賣
(ii) 車位的買賣
(iii) 一手住宅物業的買賣
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation, prescribed estate agency agreement forms (Forms 1-6) are only required for the sale and purchase of residential properties in the secondary market. Car parking spaces and first-hand residential properties under the Residential Properties (First-hand Sales) Ordinance are not covered by the prescribed forms. Therefore only (i) applies.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》，訂明的地產代理協議表格（表格1-6）僅適用於二手住宅物業的買賣。車位及受《一手住宅物業銷售條例》規管的一手住宅物業不在訂明表格的涵蓋範圍內。因此僅(i)適用。

question_en: When an estate agent issues an advertisement fo r a residential property, which of the following are matters he should pay attention t o in order to comply with the requirements of the Practice Regulation? (i) whether the information stated in the advertise ment is accurate (ii) whether the vendor’s prior written consent to the issuance of the advertisement has been obtained (iii) whether the asking price of the property stat ed in the advertisement is the market price (iv) whether the asking price of the property state d in the advertisement is in accordance with the vendor’s instruction
question_cn:
地產代理就住宅物業發出廣告時，為符合《常規規例》的規定，須注意以下哪些事項？
(i) 廣告中所述的資料是否準確
(ii) 是否已取得賣方事先的書面同意才發出廣告
(iii) 廣告中所述物業的叫價是否市場價格
(iv) 廣告中所述物業的叫價是否按照賣方的指示
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation, when issuing an advertisement for a residential property, the estate agent must ensure the information is accurate (i), obtain the vendor's prior written consent (ii), and ensure the asking price is in accordance with the vendor's instruction (iv). Whether the price is the market price (iii) is not a requirement — the price must simply follow the vendor's instructions.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》，地產代理就住宅物業發出廣告時，須確保資料準確(i)、取得賣方事先的書面同意(ii)，以及確保叫價是按照賣方的指示(iv)。叫價是否為市場價格(iii)並非要求——價格只需按照賣方指示即可。

question_en: Under the Practice Regulation, which of the fol lowing must a salesperson inform a person of before doing any estate agency work for that person? (i) He is a licensed salesperson. (ii) The number of his salesperson’s licence. (iii) The number of the statement of particulars of business of the estate agency company that he works for.
question_cn:
根據《常規規例》，營業員在為某人進行任何地產代理工作之前，須告知該人以下哪些事項？
(i) 他是持牌營業員。
(ii) 他的營業員牌照號碼。
(iii) 他所任職的地產代理公司的營業詳情說明書號碼。
explanation_en: Under Section 11 of the Practice Regulation, before doing any estate agency work for a person, a salesperson must inform that person that he is a licensed salesperson (i), the number of his licence (ii), and the number of the statement of particulars of business of his estate agency company (iii). All three items are required disclosures.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》第11條，營業員在為某人進行任何地產代理工作之前，須告知該人他是持牌營業員(i)、其牌照號碼(ii)，以及其所任職的地產代理公司的營業詳情說明書號碼(iii)。三項均為須披露的事項。

question_en: Before arranging for a purchaser who is not leg ally represented to enter into an estate agency agreement in relation to a residentia l property, which of the following is/are the step(s) that a licensee should take in order to comply with the requirements of the Practice Regulation? (i) Explain to the purchaser the different types of agency appointments in the estate agency agreement and their respective implications and effects on the purchaser. (ii) Explain to the purchaser every term and condit ion in the estate agency agreement. (iii) Recommend that the purchaser seek legal advic e if the purchaser does not understand the explanation or meaning of a ny term in the estate agency agreement.
question_cn:
在安排沒有法律代表的買方就住宅物業訂立地產代理協議之前，持牌人為符合《常規規例》的規定，應採取以下哪些步驟？
(i) 向買方解釋地產代理協議中不同類型的委託安排及其各自對買方的影響和效果。
(ii) 向買方解釋地產代理協議中的每一項條款及條件。
(iii) 建議買方如不明白任何條款的解釋或含義，應尋求法律意見。
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation (Section 6), before arranging for a purchaser who is not legally represented to enter into an estate agency agreement, a licensee must explain the different types of agency appointments and their implications (i), explain every term and condition (ii), and recommend seeking legal advice if the purchaser does not understand any term (iii). All three steps are required.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》（第6條），在安排沒有法律代表的買方訂立地產代理協議之前，持牌人須向買方解釋不同類型的委託安排及其影響(i)、解釋每一項條款及條件(ii)，以及建議買方如不明白任何條款應尋求法律意見(iii)。三個步驟均為必須。

question_en: Under the Residential Properties (First-hand Sa les) Ordinance, saleable area, in relation to a residential property, means the floor area of the residential property including the floor area of: (i) balconies (ii) bay windows (iii) cocklofts (iv) utility platforms
question_cn:
根據《一手住宅物業銷售條例》，就住宅物業而言，實用面積是指住宅物業的樓面面積，包括以下哪些的樓面面積？
(i) 露台
(ii) 窗台
(iii) 閣樓
(iv) 工作平台
explanation_en: Under the Residential Properties (First-hand Sales) Ordinance, saleable area includes the floor area of the residential property including balconies (i), bay windows (ii), cocklofts (iii), and utility platforms (iv). All four are specifically included in the definition of saleable area as set out in the Ordinance.
explanation_cn: 根據《一手住宅物業銷售條例》，實用面積包括住宅物業的樓面面積，包括露台(i)、窗台(ii)、閣樓(iii)及工作平台(iv)。四項均明確包含在該條例所訂明的實用面積定義中。

question_en: Raymond is an estate agent and the sole propriet or of XYZ Estate Agency. From time to time, he receives moneys for, or on account of a client in the course of his estate agency business. With regard to the receipt of such moneys, which of the following are among the requirements that Raymond i s required to comply with under the Estate Agents Ordinance and the Practice Regulation? (i) To deposit the moneys into a trust account main tained at an authorised institution for the benefit of the clien t. (ii) To use the moneys to pay the client concerned. (iii) To use the moneys for making a payment in acc ordance with, and pursuant to, the client’s prior written instruction s. (iv) To issue a written receipt to the client withi n fourteen days of receipt of the moneys. (v) To retain a copy of the receipt for the moneys received for not less than three years after it is issued.
question_cn:
Raymond是一名地產代理，亦是XYZ地產代理的獨資經營者。他不時在其地產代理業務過程中收取代客戶保管或代客戶收取的款項。就收取該等款項而言，根據《地產代理條例》及《常規規例》，以下哪些是Raymond須遵守的規定？
(i) 將款項存入在認可機構開設的信託帳戶，以保障客戶的利益。
(ii) 將款項用以向有關客戶付款。
(iii) 按照並根據客戶事先的書面指示將款項用以付款。
(iv) 在收到款項後十四天內向客戶發出書面收據。
(v) 將所收款項的收據副本保留不少於三年。
explanation_en: Under Section 43 of the EAO and Section 12 of the Practice Regulation, moneys received must be deposited into a trust account at an authorised institution (i), may be used to pay the client (ii), may be used for payment pursuant to client's prior written instructions (iii), and receipts must be retained for not less than 3 years (v). However, the written receipt must be issued within 7 days (not 14 days), so statement (iv) is incorrect.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第43條及《常規規例》第12條，收取的款項須存入在認可機構開設的信託帳戶(i)、可用以向有關客戶付款(ii)、可按照客戶事先的書面指示付款(iii)，以及收據須保留不少於三年(v)。然而，書面收據須在收到款項後7天（而非14天）內發出，因此陳述(iv)不正確。

question_en: Alan is the sole proprietor and manager of the m ain office of ABC Estate Agency. He is about to open a new branch office. Alan will continue to be the manager for the effective and separate control of the business of the main office. He has to appoint a manager for the new branch office. Beatri ce and Cathy, both licensed salespersons, have worked for ABC Estate Agency for five and ten years respectively. Doreen, a licensed estate agent, has worked for ABC Estate Agency for only one year. In the above situation and in or der to comply with the requirements of the Estate Agents Ordinance, who ma y be appointed as the manager for the effective and separate control of t he business of the new branch office in compliance with the Estate Agents Ordinan ce? (i) Alan (ii) Beatrice (iii) Cathy (iv) Doreen
question_cn:
Alan是ABC地產代理的獨資經營者兼總辦事處的經理。他即將開設一間新分行。Alan將繼續擔任總辦事處的經理，以有效及獨立地控制該處的業務。他須為新分行委任一名經理。Beatrice及Cathy均為持牌營業員，分別已在ABC地產代理工作五年及十年。Doreen為持牌地產代理，在ABC地產代理僅工作了一年。在上述情況下，為符合《地產代理條例》的規定，誰可獲委任為新分行的經理，以有效及獨立地控制該分行的業務？
(i) Alan
(ii) Beatrice
(iii) Cathy
(iv) Doreen
explanation_en: Under Section 38 of the EAO, the manager for effective and separate control must hold an estate agent's (individual) licence. Alan cannot serve as manager for both offices as each office requires separate control. Beatrice and Cathy are salespersons and do not qualify. Only Doreen, as a licensed estate agent, meets the requirement regardless of her shorter tenure. Experience length is not the determining factor — the licence type is.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第38條，獲委任以有效及獨立地控制業務的經理必須持有地產代理（個人）牌照。Alan不能同時擔任兩個辦事處的經理，因為每個辦事處需要獨立控制。Beatrice及Cathy為營業員，不符合資格。只有Doreen作為持牌地產代理符合要求，不論其任職年資較短。決定因素是牌照類型，而非工作經驗長短。

question_en: If a complaint against a licensee is well-founde d, which of the following are the powers under the Estate Agents Ordinance that the E state Agents Authority may exercise against the licensee concerned? (i) Admonish or reprimand the licensee. (ii) Impose a fine of $100,000 on the licensee. (iii) Suspend the licence of the licensee for three years. (iv) Revoke the licence of the licensee. (v) Attach conditions to the licence of the license e.
question_cn:
如針對持牌人的投訴成立，根據《地產代理條例》，地產代理監管局可對有關持牌人行使以下哪些權力？
(i) 訓誡或譴責該持牌人。
(ii) 向該持牌人施加$100,000的罰款。
(iii) 暫時吊銷該持牌人的牌照三年。
(iv) 撤銷該持牌人的牌照。
(v) 在該持牌人的牌照上附加條件。
explanation_en: Under Section 29 of the Estate Agents Ordinance, the EAA has broad disciplinary powers when a complaint is well-founded. These include: admonishing or reprimanding (i), imposing a fine not exceeding $500,000 — so $100,000 is within the limit (ii), suspending the licence for a period — up to 2 years for salespersons but no specific maximum for certain circumstances (iii), revoking the licence (iv), and attaching conditions to the licence (v). All five powers are available.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第29條，當投訴成立時，地產代理監管局擁有廣泛的紀律處分權力，包括：訓誡或譴責(i)、施加不超過$500,000的罰款——$100,000在限額內(ii)、暫時吊銷牌照(iii)、撤銷牌照(iv)，以及在牌照上附加條件(v)。五項權力均可行使。

question_en: In an investigation conducted by the investigat or appointed by the Estate Agents Authority under Section 28 of the Estate Agents Ord inance, which of the following are the obligations of the licensee under investigation? (i) If reasonably required by the investigator, to produce for the investigator records which the investigator conside rs to be relevant to the investigation. (ii) To allow the investigator to search his reside nce at reasonable hours. (iii) To explain a document which he has produced t o the investigator if reasonably required by the investigator. (iv) To pay reasonable costs and expenses of the in vestigation to the Estate Agents Authority upon demand.
question_cn:
在地產代理監管局根據《地產代理條例》Section 28委任的調查員所進行的調查中，被調查的持牌人有以下哪些義務？
(i) 如調查員合理要求，須出示調查員認為與調查有關的紀錄。
(ii) 准許調查員在合理時間搜查其住所。
(iii) 如調查員合理要求，須解釋其出示的文件。
(iv) 應地產代理監管局要求，支付調查的合理費用及開支。
explanation_en: Under Section 28 of the EAO, during an investigation the licensee is obligated to produce relevant records if reasonably required by the investigator (i) and to explain documents produced if reasonably required (iii). The investigator does not have the power to search a licensee's residence without a warrant (ii is incorrect), and there is no obligation to pay investigation costs (iv is incorrect).
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第28條，在調查期間，持牌人有責任在調查員合理要求下出示相關紀錄(i)，以及在調查員合理要求下解釋所出示的文件(iii)。調查員無權在沒有搜查令的情況下搜查持牌人住所(ii不正確)，持牌人亦無義務支付調查費用(iv不正確)。

question_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following are among the factors that the Estate Agents Authority must have regard to in determining whether a person is “a fit and proper person” to ho ld an estate agent’s licence (individual) or a salesperson’s licence? (i) The person is an undischarged bankrupt. (ii) The person is a mentally disordered person wit hin the meaning of the Mental Health Ordinance. (iii) The person has relevant work experience. (iv) The person was convicted in Hong Kong or elsew here of an offence which involved fraudulent, corrupt or dishonest act .
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》，地產代理監管局在決定某人是否為持有地產代理（個人）牌照或營業員牌照的「適當人選」時，須考慮以下哪些因素？
(i) 該人是未獲解除破產的破產人。
(ii) 該人是《精神健康條例》所指的精神紊亂的人。
(iii) 該人具有相關的工作經驗。
(iv) 該人曾在香港或其他地方因涉及欺詐、貪污或不誠實行為的罪行而被定罪。
explanation_en: Under Section 19(2) of the EAO, the factors the EAA must consider in determining fitness include: whether the person is an undischarged bankrupt (i), whether the person is a mentally disordered person (ii), and whether the person was convicted of an offence involving fraudulent, corrupt or dishonest conduct (iv). Relevant work experience (iii) is not a statutory factor for determining fitness, though it may be relevant for licensing requirements separately.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第19(2)條，地產代理監管局在判斷是否適當人選時須考慮的因素包括：該人是否為未獲解除破產的破產人(i)、是否為精神紊亂的人(ii)，以及是否曾因涉及欺詐、貪污或不誠實行為的罪行被定罪(iv)。相關工作經驗(iii)並非判斷是否適當人選的法定因素，雖然在發牌要求方面可能另有相關規定。

question_en: To expand its business, Good View Estate Agency Limited (“Good View”) opened a new branch office. It appointed Mr. Chan a s the manager for the effective and separate control of the business of t hat branch office in compliance with the Estate Agents Ordinance. Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following are the requirements that Good View i s required to comply with in relation to the establishment of the new branch off ice and the appointment of Mr. Chan as the manager of the new branch office? (i) Apply for a statement of particulars of busines s for the new branch office. (ii) Notify the Estate Agents Authority of the open ing of the new branch office within 31 days of opening the new branch off ice. (iii) Notify the Estate Agents Authority of the app ointment of Mr. Chan as the manager of the new branch office within 31 d ays of the appointment. (iv) Arrange for each of the directors of Good View to apply for an estate agent’s licence.
question_cn:
為擴展業務，好景地產代理有限公司（「好景」）開設了一間新分行，並委任陳先生為該分行的經理，以符合《地產代理條例》的規定有效及獨立地控制該分行的業務。根據《地產代理條例》，就開設新分行及委任陳先生為新分行經理一事，好景須遵守以下哪些規定？
(i) 為新分行申請營業詳情說明書。
(ii) 在新分行開業後31天內通知地產代理監管局有關新分行的開設。
(iii) 在委任陳先生為新分行經理後31天內通知地產代理監管局有關該委任。
(iv) 安排好景的每位董事申請地產代理牌照。
explanation_en: Under the EAO (Section 21 and Licensing Regulation Section 10), when opening a new branch, an estate agency company must apply for a statement of particulars of business (SPOB) for the new branch (i) and notify the EAA within 31 days of opening (ii). Notification of the manager appointment is part of the SPOB application process rather than a separate 31-day notification requirement. Not every director needs an estate agent's licence (iv is incorrect).
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》（第21條及《發牌規例》第10條），開設新分行時，地產代理公司須為新分行申請營業詳情說明書(i)，並在開業後31天內通知地產代理監管局(ii)。經理委任的通知屬於營業詳情說明書申請程序的一部分，而非獨立的31天通知要求。並非每位董事均須持有地產代理牌照(iv不正確)。

question_en: Under the Licensing Regulation, a holder of an e state agent’s licence who operates an estate agency business is required to s tate which of the following information in a letter issued by him or on his beh alf? (i) the number of his licence or the relevant state ment of particulars of business (ii) the business name as stated in the relevant st atement of particulars of business (iii) the address as stated in the relevant busines s registration certificate (iv) the place of business as stated in the relevan t statement of particulars of business
question_cn:
根據《發牌規例》，經營地產代理業務的地產代理牌照持有人，須在其發出或代其發出的信件中列明以下哪些資料？
(i) 其牌照號碼或相關的營業詳情說明書號碼
(ii) 相關營業詳情說明書所述的商業名稱
(iii) 相關商業登記證所述的地址
(iv) 相關營業詳情說明書所述的營業地點
explanation_en: Under the Licensing Regulation (Section 15), a licensed estate agent who operates an estate agency business must state in letters issued by or on behalf of the business: the licence number or relevant SPOB number (i), the business name as stated in the relevant SPOB (ii), and the place of business as stated in the relevant SPOB (iv). The address on the business registration certificate (iii) is not the specified requirement.
explanation_cn: 根據《發牌規例》（第15條），經營地產代理業務的持牌地產代理須在其發出或代其發出的信件中列明：牌照號碼或相關營業詳情說明書號碼(i)、相關營業詳情說明書所述的商業名稱(ii)，以及相關營業詳情說明書所述的營業地點(iv)。商業登記證所述的地址(iii)並非指定要求。

question_en: According to the Practice Circular regarding the conduct in promotional activities and the provision of property informatio n for the first sale of residential properties, which of the following is/are the prope r practice(s) that licensees must follow when incentives are offered to prospect ive purchasers? (i) Set out in writing any promise of incentives, i ncluding any gifts, discounts or rebates that has been made to prospect ive purchasers, and stipulate clearly the terms and format of the i ncentives. (ii) Advise prospective purchasers not to reveal to the vendor the offer of incentives. (iii) Inform prospective purchasers of the details of any incentives which may be offered to purchasers and state clearly whet her the incentives are offered by the vendor or their estate agency co mpanies.
question_cn:
根據有關一手住宅物業銷售中推廣活動的行為及提供物業資料的執業通告，當向準買家提供優惠時，以下哪些是持牌人必須遵從的正確做法？
(i) 以書面形式列明向準買家作出的任何優惠承諾，包括任何禮品、折扣或回贈，並清楚訂明優惠的條款及形式。
(ii) 建議準買家不要向賣方透露有關優惠。
(iii) 告知準買家可能向買家提供的任何優惠的詳情，並清楚說明優惠是由賣方還是其地產代理公司提供。
explanation_en: According to the Practice Circular on first sale of residential properties, licensees must set out in writing any promise of incentives including gifts, discounts or rebates with clear terms (i), and inform purchasers of details of incentives and clearly state whether they are offered by the vendor or the estate agency (iii). Advising purchasers not to reveal incentives to the vendor (ii) would be improper and is not a proper practice.
explanation_cn: 根據有關一手住宅物業銷售的執業通告，持牌人須以書面形式列明任何優惠承諾，包括禮品、折扣或回贈，並清楚訂明條款(i)，以及告知買家優惠詳情並清楚說明是由賣方還是地產代理公司提供(iii)。建議買家不要向賣方透露優惠(ii)屬不當行為，並非正確做法。

question_en: An estate agent persuades his purchaser client t o buy a property owned by a company. The estate agent is a major shareholder of the company. He deliberately conceals this fact from his client. Th e estate agent may have breached which of the following provisions of the C ode of Ethics? (i) Exercise due care and due diligence in fulfilli ng duties. (ii) Disclose any pecuniary or other beneficial int erests in relation to the property to all parties concerned. (iii) Carry out the client’s instructions in accord ance with the estate agency agreement. (iv) Act in an impartial and just manner to all par ties concerned in the transaction.
question_cn:
一名地產代理游說其買方客戶購買一間公司擁有的物業。該地產代理是該公司的主要股東。他蓄意向客戶隱瞞此事。該地產代理可能違反了以下哪些《操守守則》的條文？
(i) 在履行職責時恪盡謹慎及盡職的責任。
(ii) 向所有有關各方披露與物業有關的任何金錢上或其他實益利益。
(iii) 按照地產代理協議執行客戶的指示。
(iv) 以公正的態度對待交易中的所有有關各方。
explanation_en: The estate agent deliberately concealed his major shareholding in the company owning the property. This breaches the Code of Ethics requirement to exercise due care and due diligence (i) and to disclose pecuniary or beneficial interests to all parties concerned (ii). Statements (iii) and (iv) are not directly relevant — the issue is concealment of interest, not failure to follow client instructions or impartiality in a dual-agency scenario.
explanation_cn: 該地產代理蓄意隱瞞其為擁有該物業公司的主要股東。這違反了《操守守則》中恪盡謹慎及盡職責任的要求(i)，以及向所有有關各方披露金錢上或實益利益的要求(ii)。陳述(iii)及(iv)並不直接相關——問題在於隱瞞利益，而非未按客戶指示行事或雙重代理中的公正問題。

question_en: Which of the following acts of an estate agent may breach the Code of Ethics? (i) He informs his client that his estate agency fi rm can give the client a cash rebate of $8,000 when he knows in fact that hi s estate agency firm can only give a cash rebate of $4,000. (ii) He passes his client’s name and telephone numb er to his brother without the client’s consent to enable his brother to market interior design services to the client. (iii) He falsely advises his client that a rival ag ency is notorious for dishonest practices. (iv) He introduces a firm of solicitors to his clie nt at the client’s request.
question_cn:
以下哪些地產代理的行為可能違反《操守守則》？
(i) 他告訴客戶其地產代理公司可給予客戶$8,000現金回贈，但他明知其地產代理公司實際上只可給予$4,000的現金回贈。
(ii) 他未經客戶同意，將客戶的姓名及電話號碼轉給其兄弟，以便其兄弟向客戶推銷室內設計服務。
(iii) 他虛假地告訴客戶，某競爭對手代理行以不誠實做法聞名。
(iv) 他應客戶要求向客戶介紹一間律師行。
explanation_en: Misstating the cash rebate amount is dishonest and breaches the Code of Ethics (i). Passing client personal data to a third party without consent breaches privacy obligations and the Code (ii). Falsely advising that a rival agency is dishonest is unprofessional and breaches the Code (iii). Introducing a solicitor at the client's request (iv) is a normal and proper service, not a breach.
explanation_cn: 虛報現金回贈金額屬不誠實行為，違反《操守守則》(i)。未經客戶同意將其個人資料轉給第三方違反私隱義務及《操守守則》(ii)。虛假地告訴客戶競爭對手代理行不誠實屬不專業行為，違反《操守守則》(iii)。應客戶要求介紹律師行(iv)屬正常及適當的服務，並非違規。

question_en: An estate agent is required to disclose to his client any pecuniary or other beneficial interest in the property concerned. This duty is stipulated in which of the following? (i) Code of Ethics (ii) Estate Agents Ordinance (iii) Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (iv) Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance
question_cn:
地產代理須向客戶披露其在有關物業中的任何金錢上或其他實益利益。此責任載於以下哪些法例／守則中？
(i) 《操守守則》
(ii) 《地產代理條例》
(iii) 《物業轉易及財產條例》
(iv) 《不合情理合約條例》
explanation_en: The duty to disclose pecuniary or beneficial interest in the property is stipulated in both the Code of Ethics (paragraph 3.5.1) and the Estate Agents Ordinance (Section 36). It is not a requirement under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (which deals with formalities of property transactions) or the Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (which deals with unfair contract terms).
explanation_cn: 披露在物業中的金錢上或實益利益的責任載於《操守守則》（第3.5.1段）及《地產代理條例》（第36條）。這並非《物業轉易及財產條例》（處理物業交易手續）或《不合情理合約條例》（處理不公平合約條款）的要求。

question_en: Sean has decided to purchase a residential prop erty. The estate agent who acts for him also acts for the vendor. The property is subje ct to an “all moneys” mortgage. Which of the following are the proper steps that th e estate agent should take before arranging for Sean to sign the provisional a greement for sale and purchase? (i) The estate agent should complete the Property Information Form (Form 1). (ii) The estate agent should enter into the Estate Agency Agreement (Form 4) with Sean. (iii) The estate agent should conduct a land search of the property. (iv) The estate agent should check the “Owner Part iculars” in the land search to ascertain if the vendor is the owner of t he property. (v) The estate agent should advise Sean that the d eposits be held by the vendor’s solicitors as stakeholders.
question_cn:
Sean決定購買一個住宅物業。代表他的地產代理同時亦代表賣方。該物業受「全部款項」按揭所約束。在安排Sean簽署臨時買賣合約之前，以下哪些是該地產代理應採取的適當步驟？
(i) 地產代理應填妥物業資料表格（表格1）。
(ii) 地產代理應與Sean訂立地產代理協議（表格4）。
(iii) 地產代理應就該物業進行土地查冊。
(iv) 地產代理應查閱土地查冊中的「業主資料」，以確定賣方是否物業的業主。
(v) 地產代理應建議Sean將訂金由賣方律師作為保證金持有人持有。
explanation_en: Before arranging for Sean to sign the provisional agreement, the estate agent should: complete the Property Information Form (Form 1) as required for residential property sales (i), enter into Form 4 (purchaser's estate agency agreement) with Sean (ii), conduct a land search (iii), check Owner Particulars to verify the vendor's ownership (iv), and advise that deposits be held by the vendor's solicitors as stakeholders since the property is subject to an all moneys mortgage (v). All five steps are proper practice.
explanation_cn: 在安排Sean簽署臨時買賣合約之前，地產代理應：按住宅物業買賣要求填妥物業資料表格（表格1）(i)、與Sean訂立表格4（買方地產代理協議）(ii)、進行土地查冊(iii)、查閱業主資料以核實賣方的業主身份(iv)，以及因物業受全部款項按揭約束而建議將訂金由賣方律師作為保證金持有人持有(v)。五個步驟均為適當做法。

question_en: The forms of estate agency agreements prescrib ed under the Practice Regulation are NOT prescribed for which of the following purposes? (i) the sale of a residential property together wit h a car parking space (ii) the leasing of a residential property together with a car parking space (iii) the sale of a shop (iv) the leasing of an office (v) the leasing of a residential property that is n ot a self-contained unit (i.e. a residential property which does not have se parate cooking facilities and bathroom)
question_cn:
根據《常規規例》訂明的地產代理協議表格，不適用於以下哪些用途？
(i) 連同車位出售住宅物業
(ii) 連同車位出租住宅物業
(iii) 出售商舖
(iv) 出租寫字樓
(v) 出租非獨立單位的住宅物業（即不設獨立煮食設施及浴室的住宅物業）
explanation_en: The prescribed estate agency agreement forms under the Practice Regulation apply only to the sale and purchase or leasing of self-contained residential properties. They are NOT prescribed for the sale of shops (iii), leasing of offices (iv), or leasing of non-self-contained residential units lacking separate cooking facilities and bathroom (v). Sale/lease of residential property with car parking space (i) and (ii) are covered by the forms.
explanation_cn: 《常規規例》訂明的地產代理協議表格僅適用於獨立住宅物業的買賣或租賃。表格不適用於出售商舖(iii)、出租寫字樓(iv)，或出租非獨立單位的住宅物業即不設獨立煮食設施及浴室的住宅物業(v)。連同車位出售或出租住宅物業(i)及(ii)則在表格涵蓋範圍內。

question_en: FILL IN THE BLANK: Please choose the correct answer from A to E. According to the Estate Agency Agreement (Form 3), the duties of an estate agent acting for a vendor in the sale of a resident ial property include marketing the property, obtaining information about the prope rty for the vendor and conducting ______________.
question_cn: 填充題：請從A至E中選擇正確答案。根據地產代理協議（表格3），代表賣方出售住宅物業的地產代理的職責包括推銷物業、為賣方取得物業資料及進行______________。

options_en.A: an investigation of the purchaser’s background
options_en.C: a bankruptcy search of the purchaser

options_cn.D: 與有興趣的買方進行磋商

explanation_en: According to the Estate Agency Agreement (Form 3), the duties of an estate agent acting for a vendor include marketing the property, obtaining information about the property for the vendor, and conducting negotiations with interested purchasers. Investigating the purchaser's background, inspecting the property, bankruptcy search, or valuation are not listed as standard duties in Form 3.
explanation_cn: 根據地產代理協議（表格3），代表賣方出售住宅物業的地產代理的職責包括推銷物業、為賣方取得物業資料及與有興趣的買方進行磋商。調查買方背景、視察物業、破產查冊或物業估價均非表格3所列的標準職責。

question_en: Mr. Chan is a salesperson of XYZ Estate Agency. Mr. Chan receives $40,000 in cash from Mrs. Poon, a purchaser. The money is for paying the initial deposit to the vendor in a property transaction. At that time, the vendor is not in Hong Kong. Under the Practice Regulation, how should Mr. Chan deal with the money in these circumstances?
question_cn: 陳先生是XYZ地產代理的營業員。陳先生收到買方潘太太$40,000的現金，該筆款項是用於向賣方支付一宗物業交易的臨時訂金。當時賣方不在香港。根據《常規規例》，在這種情況下，陳先生應如何處理該筆款項？

options_en.A: Mr. Chan should immediately deposit the money i nto a trust account maintained by the vendor’s solicitors at a bank.
options_en.B: Mr. Chan should immediately deposit the money i nto a trust account maintained by Mrs. Poon’s solicitors at a bank.
options_en.C: Mr. Chan should immediately deposit the money i nto the office account of XYZ Estate Agency maintained at a bank.
options_en.D: Mr. Chan should immediately deposit the money in to his supervisor’s personal account maintained at a bank.
options_en.E: Mr. Chan should immediately deposit the money in to a trust account of XYZ Estate Agency maintained at a bank.

options_cn.A: 陳先生應立即將款項存入賣方律師在銀行開設的信託帳戶。
options_cn.B: 陳先生應立即將款項存入潘太太的律師在銀行開設的信託帳戶。
options_cn.C: 陳先生應立即將款項存入XYZ地產代理在銀行開設的公司帳戶。
options_cn.D: 陳先生應立即將款項存入其上司在銀行開設的個人帳戶。
options_cn.E: 陳先生應立即將款項存入XYZ地產代理在銀行開設的信託帳戶。

explanation_en: Under Section 43 of the EAO and Section 12 of the Practice Regulation, when a salesperson receives money on behalf of a client, the money must be immediately deposited into the estate agency's trust account maintained at an authorised institution. The trust account of XYZ Estate Agency is the correct destination, not a personal account, office account, or a solicitor's trust account.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第43條及《常規規例》第12條，營業員代客戶收取款項時，須立即將款項存入地產代理公司在認可機構開設的信託帳戶。XYZ地產代理的信託帳戶是正確的存放處，而非個人帳戶、公司帳戶或律師的信託帳戶。

question_en: According to the Practice Regulation or the Lic ensing Regulation, which of the following statements is INCORRECT ?
question_cn: 根據《常規規例》或《發牌規例》，以下哪項陳述是不正確的？

options_en.A: An estate agent must not issue an advertisement relating to his estate agency business which contains any statement which is fals e or misleading in a material particular.
options_en.B: An estate agent must not issue any advertisement in respect of a vendor’s residential property without the vendor’s written c onsent.
options_en.C: An estate agent may issue advertisements in resp ect of a vendor’s residential property unless the vendor has specific ally instructed him not to do so.
options_en.D: An estate agent must state in the advertisement of a property the number of his licence or the relevant statement of particular s of business.
options_en.E: An estate agent who issues an advertisement in r espect of a residential property which is to be sublet must state in the ad vertisement that the property is to be sublet.

options_cn.A: 地產代理不得發出與其地產代理業務有關的廣告，而該廣告載有在要項上屬虛假或具誤導性的陳述。
options_cn.B: 地產代理未取得賣方的書面同意前，不得就賣方的住宅物業發出任何廣告。
options_cn.C: 地產代理可就賣方的住宅物業發出廣告，除非賣方已明確指示其不得這樣做。
options_cn.D: 地產代理須在物業廣告中列明其牌照號碼或相關的營業詳情說明書號碼。
options_cn.E: 地產代理如就擬分租的住宅物業發出廣告，須在廣告中說明該物業屬分租物業。

explanation_en: Statement C is INCORRECT because under the Practice Regulation, an estate agent must obtain the vendor's prior written consent before issuing any advertisement for a residential property. The agent cannot simply issue advertisements unless specifically instructed not to — the default requires affirmative written consent. All other statements (A, B, D, E) correctly state the regulatory requirements.
explanation_cn: 陳述C不正確，因為根據《常規規例》，地產代理在就住宅物業發出任何廣告前，必須取得賣方事先的書面同意。地產代理不能僅在賣方明確指示不得發出廣告時才停止——預設要求是須取得肯定的書面同意。其他陳述(A、B、D、E)均正確陳述了規管要求。

question_en: Simon is a salesperson. He obtained his salespe rson’s licence three years ago and has since then worked as a salesperson for ABC Esta te Agency. One day, Mr. Pang went to ABC Estate Agency to look for a suitab le property to purchase for investment. He was served by Simon. Under the Pract ice Regulation, which of the following are the matters that Simon must infor m Mr. Pang of before he carries out estate agency work for Mr. Pang? (i) the fact that he is a licensed salesperson (ii) the number of his licence (iii) the year he first obtained his licence (iv) the validity period of his licence (v) the number of transactions he handled in the pr evious three months
question_cn:
Simon是一名營業員。他三年前取得營業員牌照，此後一直在ABC地產代理擔任營業員。某日，彭先生到ABC地產代理尋找合適的物業作投資之用，由Simon接待。根據《常規規例》，以下哪些是Simon在為彭先生進行地產代理工作之前須告知彭先生的事項？
(i) 他是持牌營業員
(ii) 他的牌照號碼
(iii) 他首次取得牌照的年份
(iv) 他的牌照有效期
(v) 他在過去三個月處理的交易數目
explanation_en: Under Section 11 of the Practice Regulation, before carrying out estate agency work, a salesperson must inform the person that he is a licensed salesperson (i) and the number of his licence (ii). The year of first obtaining the licence (iii), the validity period (iv), and the number of transactions handled (v) are not required disclosures under the Practice Regulation.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》第11條，營業員在進行地產代理工作之前，須告知該人他是持牌營業員(i)及其牌照號碼(ii)。首次取得牌照的年份(iii)、牌照有效期(iv)及過去三個月處理的交易數目(v)均非《常規規例》要求披露的事項。

question_en: Mr. Chan, a vendor, has entered into a provisio nal agreement for sale and purchase with a purchaser to sell his residential p roperty. The transaction is handled by ABC Estate Agency. The provisional agree ment for sale and purchase contains a clause which provides that Mr. Chan agre es to pay commission to ABC Estate Agency. However, Mr. Chan refuses to pay the commission. ABC Estate Agency intends to take legal action to recov er the outstanding commission. According to the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following must ABC Estate Agency have done before it may sue Mr. Chan? (i) ABC Estate Agency must have first registered th e provisional agreement for sale and purchase against the propert y in the Land Registry. (ii) ABC Estate Agency must have first entered into an Estate Agency Agreement (Form 3) with Mr. Chan. (iii) ABC Estate Agency must have first submitted a n Estate Agency Agreement (Form 3) to the Estate Agents Authority f or approval.
question_cn:
賣方陳先生已就其住宅物業與買方訂立臨時買賣合約。該宗交易由ABC地產代理處理。臨時買賣合約載有一項條款，訂明陳先生同意向ABC地產代理支付佣金。然而，陳先生拒絕支付佣金。ABC地產代理擬採取法律行動追討未付佣金。根據《地產代理條例》，ABC地產代理在向陳先生提出訴訟之前，必須已完成以下哪些事項？
(i) ABC地產代理必須先在土地註冊處將臨時買賣合約針對該物業進行註冊。
(ii) ABC地產代理必須先與陳先生訂立地產代理協議（表格3）。
(iii) ABC地產代理必須先將地產代理協議（表格3）提交地產代理監管局批准。
explanation_en: Under Section 46 of the Estate Agents Ordinance, an estate agent cannot bring legal proceedings to recover commission unless a prescribed estate agency agreement has been entered into. ABC Estate Agency must have first entered into Form 3 (vendor's estate agency agreement) with Mr. Chan before it can sue. Registration at the Land Registry (i) and EAA approval of the form (iii) are not prerequisites for suing.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第46條，地產代理如未訂立訂明的地產代理協議，則不能提起法律程序追討佣金。ABC地產代理必須先與陳先生訂立表格3（賣方地產代理協議），才可提出訴訟。在土地註冊處登記(i)及向地產代理監管局提交表格審批(iii)均非提訴的先決條件。

question_en: Which of the following are the duties of an est ate agent stipulated in the Estate Agency Agreement (Form 4)? (i) to obtain property information for the purchase r (ii) to arrange for the purchaser to inspect proper ties if so requested (iii) to procure a mortgage for the purchaser (iv) to conduct negotiations for the purchaser (v) to assist the purchaser in entering into an agr eement for sale and purchase with the vendor
question_cn:
以下哪些是地產代理協議（表格4）所訂明的地產代理職責？
(i) 為買方取得物業資料
(ii) 應要求安排買方視察物業
(iii) 為買方安排按揭
(iv) 為買方進行磋商
(v) 協助買方與賣方訂立買賣合約
explanation_en: Under the Estate Agency Agreement (Form 4), the duties of an estate agent acting for a purchaser include: obtaining property information for the purchaser (i), arranging for the purchaser to inspect properties if requested (ii), conducting negotiations for the purchaser (iv), and assisting the purchaser in entering into an agreement for sale and purchase (v). Procuring a mortgage (iii) is NOT a duty specified in Form 4.
explanation_cn: 根據地產代理協議（表格4），代表買方的地產代理的職責包括：為買方取得物業資料(i)、應要求安排買方視察物業(ii)、為買方進行磋商(iv)，以及協助買方與賣方訂立買賣合約(v)。安排按揭(iii)並非表格4所訂明的職責。

question_en: The vendor of a “Home Ownership Scheme” propert y should pay the premium to which of the following departments/organisations if he sells his property in the open market rather than under the HOS Secondary Mar ket Scheme?
question_cn: 「居者有其屋計劃」物業的賣方如在公開市場（而非透過居屋第二市場計劃）出售其物業，須向以下哪個部門／機構繳付補價？
explanation_en: Home Ownership Scheme (HOS) flats are developed and managed by the Hong Kong Housing Authority. When selling an HOS flat on the open market, the vendor must pay the premium (the difference between the discounted purchase price and the market value) to the Hong Kong Housing Authority, which is the body that granted the original discount.
explanation_cn: 居者有其屋計劃（居屋）單位由香港房屋委員會發展及管理。在公開市場出售居屋單位時，賣方須向香港房屋委員會繳付補價（即折扣購入價與市值之間的差額），因為香港房屋委員會是最初給予折扣的機構。

question_en: Under the Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance, w hich of the following matters may the court have regard to in determining whether a contract or part of a contract was unconscionable in the circumstances re lating to the contract at the time it was made? (i) the relative strengths of the bargaining positi ons of the parties (ii) whether the consumer was able to understand an y documents relating to the supply of goods or services (iii) whether any undue influence or pressure was e xerted on the consumer or any unfair tactics used against him
question_cn:
根據《不合情理合約條例》，法院在裁定一份合約或其部分條款在訂立時的情況下是否屬不合情理時，可考慮以下哪些事項？
(i) 雙方議價能力的相對強弱
(ii) 消費者是否能夠理解與供應貨品或服務有關的任何文件
(iii) 是否對消費者施加了不當影響或壓力，或對消費者使用了不公平的手段
explanation_en: Under the Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (Cap. 458), the court may have regard to multiple factors in determining unconscionability, including the relative strengths of bargaining positions (i), whether the consumer could understand the relevant documents (ii), and whether undue influence, pressure, or unfair tactics were used (iii). All three are expressly listed in Section 6 of the Ordinance.
explanation_cn: 根據《不合情理合約條例》（第458章），法院在裁定是否屬不合情理時可考慮多項因素，包括雙方議價能力的相對強弱(i)、消費者是否能夠理解有關文件(ii)，以及是否對消費者施加了不當影響或壓力或使用了不公平手段(iii)。三項均明確列於該條例第6條。

question_en: FILL IN THE BLANK: Please choose the correct answer from A to E. In the sale of a “Home Ownership Scheme” flat in th e open market where 5 years has elapsed since the date of the first assig nment and the premium has not yet been paid to the Hong Kong Housing Authority, t he agreement for sale and purchase must state that, unless the Director of Ho using stipulates otherwise, the vendor must pay the premium to the Hong Kong Housin g Authority within of the date of the agreement for sale a nd purchase and before assignment.
question_cn: 填充題：請從A至E中選擇正確答案。在公開市場出售「居者有其屋計劃」單位，而自首次轉讓契據日期起計已超過5年且尚未向香港房屋委員會繳付補價的情況下，買賣合約必須訂明，除非房屋署署長另有規定，賣方須在買賣合約日期起______________內及轉讓之前向香港房屋委員會繳付補價。
explanation_en: For the sale of an HOS flat on the open market where more than 5 years have elapsed since the first assignment and the premium has not been paid, the agreement for sale and purchase must state that the vendor must pay the premium to the Hong Kong Housing Authority within 28 days of the date of the agreement for sale and purchase and before assignment, unless the Director of Housing stipulates otherwise.
explanation_cn: 在公開市場出售居屋單位，而自首次轉讓契據日期起計已超過5年且尚未繳付補價的情況下，買賣合約必須訂明，除非房屋署署長另有規定，賣方須在買賣合約日期起28天內及轉讓之前向香港房屋委員會繳付補價。

question_en: Raymond is an estate agent who often refers cl ients to Big Profit Bank for mortgages. In order to obtain a favourable valuatio n, he gives a clerk in the mortgage department of the bank $10,000 per month. Which of the following may Raymond have breached? (i) Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (ii) Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (iii) Code of Ethics
question_cn:
Raymond是一名地產代理，經常轉介客戶到大利銀行申請按揭。為取得有利的估價，他每月向該銀行按揭部的一名職員支付$10,000。Raymond可能違反了以下哪些法例？
(i) 《防止賄賂條例》
(ii) 《物業轉易及財產條例》
(iii) 《操守守則》
explanation_en: Raymond's payment of $10,000 per month to a bank clerk to obtain favourable valuations constitutes offering an advantage to an agent of the bank, which is an offence under the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (i). This conduct also breaches the Code of Ethics as it involves dishonest and unprofessional practice (iii). The Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (ii) deals with formalities of property transactions and is not directly relevant here.
explanation_cn: Raymond每月向銀行職員支付$10,000以取得有利估價，構成向銀行代理人提供利益，屬於違反《防止賄賂條例》(i)的罪行。此行為亦違反《操守守則》，因為涉及不誠實及不專業的做法(iii)。《物業轉易及財產條例》(ii)處理物業交易手續，與此事並不直接相關。

question_en: Under the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance, an a gent commits an offence if he, without his principal’s consent, accepts from a thi rd party any advantage as reward for doing, or forbearing to do, any act in r elation to his principal’s business. Which of the following constitutes an “ad vantage” under the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance? (i) a commission (ii) the gift of a gold watch (iii) a loan
question_cn:
根據《防止賄賂條例》，代理人如未經其主事人同意，接受第三方提供的任何利益，作為其就主事人業務作出或不作出任何行為的報酬，即屬犯罪。以下哪些構成《防止賄賂條例》下的「利益」？
(i) 佣金
(ii) 饋贈一隻金錶
(iii) 貸款
explanation_en: Under the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (Cap. 201), 'advantage' is defined very broadly in Section 2 and includes any gift, loan, fee, reward, commission, office, employment, contract, service, favour, or any valuable consideration. A commission (i), a gold watch as a gift (ii), and a loan (iii) all constitute 'advantages' under the Ordinance.
explanation_cn: 根據《防止賄賂條例》（第201章），「利益」在第2條中有非常廣泛的定義，包括任何饋贈、貸款、費用、報酬、佣金、職位、僱用、合約、服務、優惠或任何有價值的代價。佣金(i)、饋贈的金錶(ii)及貸款(iii)均構成該條例下的「利益」。

question_en: A salesperson uses personal data which are save d in the computer record of his estate agency to make telephone calls to a number o f property owners to offer his service. To comply with the provisions of the Perso nal Data (Privacy) Ordinance on direct marketing, which of the following stateme nts should the salesperson make to the property owners when he calls them for the first time? (i) “I am required to store your personal data in a manner specified by you.” (ii) “If you make a request for me to cease using y our personal data for direct marketing, I shall do so without charge.” (iii) “I am obliged to return your personal data to you after use.”
question_cn:
一名營業員使用其地產代理電腦記錄中儲存的個人資料，致電多名物業業主以推銷其服務。為遵守《個人資料（私隱）條例》有關直接促銷的規定，該營業員在首次致電物業業主時應作出以下哪些聲明？
(i) 「我須按照閣下指定的方式儲存閣下的個人資料。」
(ii) 「如閣下要求我停止使用閣下的個人資料作直接促銷用途，我將免費照辦。」
(iii) 「我有責任在使用後將閣下的個人資料交還閣下。」
explanation_en: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486), when using personal data for direct marketing for the first time, the data user must inform the data subject that if they request cessation of using their data for direct marketing, the data user must comply without charge (ii). There is no requirement to store data in a manner specified by the data subject (i) or to return data after use (iii).
explanation_cn: 根據《個人資料（私隱）條例》（第486章），首次使用個人資料作直接促銷時，資料使用者須告知資料當事人，如其要求停止使用其個人資料作直接促銷用途，資料使用者須免費照辦(ii)。條例並無要求按資料當事人指定的方式儲存資料(i)或在使用後交還資料(iii)。

question_en: Under the Land Registration Ordinance, which o f the following instruments is/are registrable in the Land Registry? (i) A deed of gift in respect of a residential prop erty. (ii) A mortgage in respect of a car-parking space. (iii) A charging order in respect of a commercial p roperty.
question_cn:
根據《土地註冊條例》，以下哪些文書可在土地註冊處註冊？
(i) 一份有關住宅物業的饋贈契據。
(ii) 一份有關車位的按揭。
(iii) 一份有關商業物業的押記令。
explanation_en: Under the Land Registration Ordinance (Cap. 128), s.2 defines 'instrument' broadly to include any deed or document affecting land. A deed of gift (i), a mortgage over a car-parking space (ii), and a charging order over commercial property (iii) are all registrable instruments as they each affect interests in land. All three are registrable in the Land Registry.
explanation_cn: 根據《土地註冊條例》（第128章）第2條，「文書」的定義廣泛，包括任何影響土地的契據或文件。饋贈契據(i)、車位按揭(ii)及商業物業押記令(iii)均屬影響土地權益的文書，因此三者均可在土地註冊處註冊。

question_en: The land search of a flat which Mrs. Lam plans to purchase reveals that a dangerous hillside order has been registered recent ly. The order requires the owners of the building to carry out maintenance wor k on a slope adjacent to the building. Which of the following pieces of advice g iven by the salesperson acting for Mrs. Lam is/are correct? (i) Mrs. Lam may disregard the order, as it was iss ued before she enters into the provisional agreement for sale and purchas e. (ii) The provisional agreement for sale and purchas e should stipulate which party shall bear the cost of the maintenance work. (iii) The Incorporated Owners will be responsible f or slope maintenance and Mrs. Lam will not have to bear the costs of the maintenance work.
question_cn:
林太太擬購買的一個單位的土地查冊顯示，最近有一項危險斜坡令已被註冊。該命令要求大廈業主對毗鄰大廈的斜坡進行維修工程。以下哪些由代表林太太的營業員提供的建議是正確的？
(i) 林太太可忽略該命令，因為該命令是在她簽訂臨時買賣合約之前發出的。
(ii) 臨時買賣合約應訂明由哪一方承擔維修工程的費用。
(iii) 業主立案法團將負責斜坡維修，林太太無需承擔維修費用。
explanation_en: Statement (ii) is correct: the PASP should stipulate which party bears the cost of the slope maintenance work required by the dangerous hillside order, as this is a material encumbrance affecting the property. Statement (i) is wrong because a registered order runs with the land and binds subsequent purchasers regardless of when it was issued. Statement (iii) is wrong because the IO may not necessarily bear all costs, and individual owners may be liable depending on the DMC terms.
explanation_cn: 陳述(ii)正確：臨時買賣合約應訂明由哪一方承擔危險斜坡令所要求的斜坡維修費用，因為這是影響物業的重要產權負擔。陳述(i)不正確，因為已註冊的命令隨土地轉移，無論何時發出均約束其後的買家。陳述(iii)不正確，因為業主立案法團未必承擔所有費用，個別業主可能需按公契條款負責。

question_en: Under the Stamp Duty Ordinance, stamp duty is p ayable on which of the following instruments pertaining to a residential p roperty? (i) deed of gift (ii) assignment (iii) deed of mutual covenant (iv) agreement for sale and purchase
question_cn:
根據《印花稅條例》，以下哪些有關住宅物業的文書須繳付印花稅？
(i) 饋贈契據
(ii) 轉讓契
(iii) 公契
(iv) 買賣合約
explanation_en: Under the Stamp Duty Ordinance (Cap. 117), stamp duty is payable on conveyances on sale, which includes deeds of gift (i) (treated as conveyances), assignments (ii), and agreements for sale and purchase (iv). A deed of mutual covenant (iii) is not a conveyance on sale and is not subject to ad valorem stamp duty. Therefore, only (i), (ii) and (iv) attract stamp duty.
explanation_cn: 根據《印花稅條例》（第117章），售賣轉易契須繳付印花稅，包括饋贈契據(i)（被視為轉易契）、轉讓契(ii)及買賣合約(iv)。公契(iii)並非售賣轉易契，無須繳付從價印花稅。因此，只有(i)、(ii)及(iv)須繳付印花稅。

question_en: Mr. Li decided to buy a ground floor unit whic h had been used as a restaurant for nearly ten years. After paying the further deposit and signing the formal agreement for sale and purchase, he was told by his lawyer that the occupation permit of the building showed that the permitted us er of the unit was “domestic”. Which of the following statements is/are correct? (i) The permitted user of the unit can always be ch anged upon payment of a premium. (ii) The Building Authority may by notice require t he owner to discontinue the use of the unit as a restaurant. (iii) The use of the unit as a restaurant might con travene the Deed of Mutual Covenant of the building.
question_cn:
李先生決定購買一個已用作餐廳近十年的地下單位。在繳付加付訂金及簽署正式買賣合約後，他的律師告知他該大廈的入伙紙顯示該單位的批准用途為「住宅」。以下哪些陳述是正確的？
(i) 該單位的批准用途可隨時在繳付補價後更改。
(ii) 建築事務監督可藉通知要求業主停止將該單位用作餐廳。
(iii) 將該單位用作餐廳可能違反大廈的公契。
explanation_en: Statement (i) is incorrect because changing the permitted use is not always possible simply by paying a premium; it depends on government lease conditions, zoning, and Building Authority approval. Statement (ii) is correct: under the Buildings Ordinance, the Building Authority may issue a notice requiring discontinuation of unauthorized use. Statement (iii) is correct: using a unit as a restaurant when permitted use is 'domestic' may contravene DMC restrictions on use.
explanation_cn: 陳述(i)不正確，因為更改批准用途並非總是只需繳付補價即可，還取決於政府租契條件、規劃用途及建築事務監督的批准。陳述(ii)正確：根據《建築物條例》，建築事務監督可發出通知要求停止未經授權的用途。陳述(iii)正確：在批准用途為「住宅」的情況下將單位用作餐廳，可能違反公契中有關用途的限制。

question_en: Under the Stamp Duty Ordinance, the prescribed time limit for stamping and the maximum penalty payable for late stamping of a tena ncy agreement are respectively:
question_cn: 根據《印花稅條例》，租約的加蓋印花的法定期限及逾期加蓋印花的最高罰款分別為：

options_en.A: 7 days after execution; two times the amount of the stamp duty
options_en.B: 14 days after execution; four times the amount o f the stamp duty
options_en.C: 15 days after execution; six times the amount of the stamp duty
options_en.D: 30 days after execution; two times the amount of the stamp duty
options_en.E: 30 days after execution; ten times the amount of the stamp duty 41

options_cn.A: 簽立後7天；印花稅金額的兩倍
options_cn.B: 簽立後14天；印花稅金額的四倍
options_cn.C: 簽立後15天；印花稅金額的六倍
options_cn.D: 簽立後30天；印花稅金額的兩倍
options_cn.E: 簽立後30天；印花稅金額的十倍 41

explanation_en: Under the Stamp Duty Ordinance (Cap. 117), s.5 and Head 1(2) of the First Schedule, a tenancy agreement must be stamped within 30 days after execution. The maximum penalty for late stamping is 10 times the amount of stamp duty payable, as prescribed under s.9 of the Ordinance for instruments stamped after the latest prescribed period.
explanation_cn: 根據《印花稅條例》（第117章）第5條及附表1第1(2)類，租約須在簽立後30天內加蓋印花。逾期加蓋印花的最高罰款為應繳印花稅金額的十倍，此為該條例第9條就在最遲規定期限後加蓋印花的文書所訂明的罰款。

question_en: A purchaser purchases a property. Under the ag reement for sale and purchase, the vendor shall deliver vacant possession of the prope rty on completion. To protect the purchaser’s interest, the estate agent acting f or the purchaser should advise the purchaser to inspect the property before comple tion for which of the following purposes? (i) to ascertain that the vendor has removed from t he property all chattels and furniture not sold together with the p roperty (ii) to ascertain that the vendor is indeed in a po sition to deliver vacant possession of the property on completion (iii) to arrange for decoration of the property
question_cn:
買方購買一個物業。根據買賣合約，賣方須在完成交易時交付物業的空置管有權。為保障買方的利益，代表買方的地產代理應建議買方在完成交易前驗樓，目的是以下哪些？
(i) 確定賣方已將並非連同物業出售的所有動產及傢俬搬離物業
(ii) 確定賣方確實能在完成交易時交付物業的空置管有權
(iii) 安排物業的裝修
explanation_en: When a property is sold with vacant possession, the estate agent should advise the purchaser to inspect the property before completion to: (i) ascertain that the vendor has removed all chattels and furniture not included in the sale, and (ii) ascertain that the vendor can indeed deliver vacant possession. Statement (iii) about arranging decoration is not a purpose related to protecting the purchaser's legal interests in the transaction.
explanation_cn: 當物業以交付空置管有權的方式出售時，地產代理應建議買方在完成交易前驗樓，以：(i)確定賣方已將並非連同物業出售的所有動產及傢俬搬離；及(ii)確定賣方確實能交付物業的空置管有權。陳述(iii)關於安排裝修並非與保障買方在交易中的法律權益有關的目的。

question_en: When a provisional agreement for sale and purch ase provides that the property will be sold on an “as is” basis, it means which of the following?
question_cn: 當臨時買賣合約訂明物業以「現狀」出售時，這意味着以下哪一項？

options_en.A: Vacant possession of the property will be delive red to the purchaser upon completion.
options_en.B: A warranty is given by the vendor on the physica l condition of the property.
options_en.C: The property has no unauthorised building works.
options_en.D: The property is sold to the purchaser in such ph ysical condition as at the time the provisional agreement for sale and pur chase was entered into.
options_en.E: The property is sold to the purchaser in such ph ysical condition as at the time of purchase by the first-hand owner from the d eveloper.

options_cn.A: 物業的空置管有權將在完成交易時交付買方。
options_cn.B: 賣方就物業的實際狀況作出保證。
options_cn.C: 物業沒有違例建築工程。
options_cn.D: 物業以臨時買賣合約簽訂時的實際狀況出售予買方。
options_cn.E: 物業以一手業主向發展商購買時的實際狀況出售予買方。

explanation_en: When a property is sold on an 'as is' basis, it means the property is sold in such physical condition as at the time the provisional agreement for sale and purchase was entered into. The vendor gives no warranty about the condition of the property, and the purchaser accepts the property in its existing state at the time of contract.
explanation_cn: 當物業以「現狀」出售時，意味着物業以臨時買賣合約簽訂時的實際狀況出售予買方。賣方不就物業狀況作出保證，買方接受物業在簽約時的現有狀況。

question_en: The Estate Agents Authority has issued a Practi ce Circular giving guidelines to estate agency practitioners on the prevention of mo ney laundering activities. According to the Practice Circular, estate agency p ractitioners should report a suspicious case of money laundering to which of the following?
question_cn: 地產代理監管局發出了執業通告，就防止洗黑錢活動向地產代理從業員提供指引。根據該執業通告，地產代理從業員如遇到懷疑洗黑錢個案，應向以下哪個機構舉報？
explanation_en: According to the EAA Practice Circular on prevention of money laundering, estate agency practitioners who encounter suspicious money laundering cases should report them to the Joint Financial Intelligence Unit (JFIU), which is jointly operated by the Hong Kong Police Force and the Customs and Excise Department.
explanation_cn: 根據地產代理監管局有關防止洗黑錢的執業通告，地產代理從業員如遇到懷疑洗黑錢個案，應向聯合財富情報組(JFIU)舉報。聯合財富情報組由香港警務處及香港海關聯合運作，是香港接收此類舉報的指定機構。

question_en: A land search reveals that a property was purc hased three years ago for $5 million. The property is subject to an “all monies” mortgage, and the vendor agrees to sell it for $3.8 million because the prop erty market has gone down. Which of the following steps should the salesperson acting for the purchaser take in the circumstances? (i) Suggest to the purchaser that the deposits shou ld be stakeheld by a firm of solicitors. (ii) Explain to the purchaser the risks of not arra nging for the stakeholding of the deposits. (iii) If the purchaser chooses not to arrange for t he stakeholding of the deposit, obtain a written acknowledgement from the purchaser that the salesperson has provided suggestions and explan ations to the purchaser on the stakeholding of deposits.
question_cn:
土地查冊顯示一個物業於三年前以$5,000,000購入。該物業受「全部款項」按揭所約束，而賣方因物業市場下跌同意以$3,800,000出售。在這種情況下，代表買方的營業員應採取以下哪些步驟？
(i) 向買方建議訂金應由一間律師行作為保證金持有人持有。
(ii) 向買方解釋不安排保證金持有訂金的風險。
(iii) 如買方選擇不安排保證金持有訂金，應取得買方的書面確認，確認營業員已就訂金的保證金持有安排向買方提供建議及解釋。
explanation_en: When a property is in negative equity (purchased for $5M, now selling at $3.8M with an all-monies mortgage), there is a significant risk that the vendor may not be able to discharge the mortgage on completion. The salesperson should: (i) suggest stakeholding of deposits by solicitors, (ii) explain the risks of not arranging stakeholding, and (iii) obtain written acknowledgement if the purchaser chooses not to arrange stakeholding. All three steps are required under EAA guidelines.
explanation_cn: 當物業處於負資產狀態（以$5,000,000購入，現以$3,800,000出售，並設有全部款項按揭），賣方在完成交易時可能無法解除按揭的風險很大。營業員應：(i)建議由律師行持有訂金作為保證金；(ii)解釋不安排保證金持有的風險；及(iii)如買方選擇不安排保證金持有，應取得買方的書面確認。根據地產代理監管局指引，三個步驟均為必需。

question_en: Which of the following statements regarding the deed of mutual covenant of a building is NOT CORRECT ?
question_cn: 以下哪項有關大廈公契的陳述是不正確的？

options_en.A: It states that the owner of a unit in the buildi ng shall not use his unit for certain purposes.
options_en.B: It is a deed entered into between the developer of the building and the first purchaser of a unit in the building.
options_en.C: Its terms relate to the management of the buildi ng.
options_en.D: It is a deed by which the owners of the building mutually covenanted to exchange their units.
options_en.E: It is a document which can be registered in the Land Registry.

options_cn.A: 公契訂明大廈單位的業主不得將其單位用於某些用途。
options_cn.B: 公契是由大廈的發展商與大廈首位單位買家之間訂立的契據。
options_cn.C: 公契的條款與大廈的管理有關。
options_cn.D: 公契是業主之間互相承諾交換其單位的契據。
options_cn.E: 公契是一份可在土地註冊處註冊的文件。

explanation_en: A deed of mutual covenant (DMC) is NOT a deed by which owners mutually covenant to exchange their units. A DMC is a document entered into between the developer and the first purchaser that sets out the rights and obligations of owners regarding management, use restrictions, common areas, and undivided shares. Option D is an incorrect description and is therefore the answer.
