question_en: With regard to the advertisement for the Proper ty issued by Smart Agency for Mr. Wan, which of the following statements is/are consi stent with the Practice Regulation? (i) Smart Agency should advertise the Property at t he list price of $6.5 million unless Mr. Wan changed his instructions on the list price. (ii) Smart Agency should advertise the Property at the prevailing market price irrespective of Mr. Wan’s instruction. (iii) Smart Agency should remove the advertisement as soon as practicable after the Property is sold.
question_cn:
就Smart Agency為溫先生刊登的該物業廣告而言，以下哪些陳述符合《常規規例》？
(i) Smart Agency應以$650萬的放盤價宣傳該物業，除非溫先生更改其對放盤價的指示。
(ii) Smart Agency應以當時的市場價格宣傳該物業，不論溫先生的指示如何。
(iii) Smart Agency應在該物業售出後盡快撤除廣告。
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation: (i) the agent must advertise at the client's instructed price unless changed - correct. (iii) Advertisements should be removed after sale - correct. (ii) is incorrect because the agent must follow client instructions, not advertise at market price irrespective of instructions.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》：(i) 代理必須按客戶指示價格刊登廣告——正確。(iii) 物業售出後應撤除廣告——正確。(ii) 不正確，代理必須遵從客戶指示，而非不顧指示以市場價格刊登。

question_en: Which of the following pieces of advice given b y Edith to Mr. Wan are probably INCORRECT ? (i) Mr. Wan might sell the Property as sole owner s o long as he is able to produce the death certificate and the will of hi s brother. (ii) Mr. Wan would not be liable to pay any commiss ion to Bright Agency because Bright Agency had not introduced any purchasers to Mr. Wan. (iii) There was no need to mention the Building Ord er in the Property Information Form (Form 1) or provisional agreement for sale and purchase. (iv) Mr. Wan could terminate Bright Agency’s exclus ive agency appointment by giving a notice of termination to Br ight Agency.
question_cn:
以下Edith給予溫先生的哪些建議可能是不正確的？
(i) 溫先生只要能出示其兄弟的死亡證明書及遺囑，便可以唯一業主身份出售該物業。
(ii) 溫先生無須向明亮代理支付任何佣金，因為明亮代理並未為溫先生介紹任何買家。
(iii) 無需在物業資料表格（表格1）或臨時買賣合約中提及建築命令。
(iv) 溫先生可向明亮代理發出終止通知，藉此終止明亮代理的獨家代理委任。
explanation_en: Advice (i) is incorrect: a grant of probate is needed, not just death certificate and will. Advice (ii) is incorrect: under an exclusive agency, commission may be payable even without introducing the buyer. Advice (iii) is incorrect: the building order must be disclosed. Advice (iv) is correct: exclusive agency can be terminated by notice.
explanation_cn: 建議 (i) 不正確：需要遺囑認證書，僅有死亡證明書及遺囑不足。建議 (ii) 不正確：獨家代理下即使未介紹買家仍可能須付佣金。建議 (iii) 不正確：建築命令必須披露。建議 (iv) 正確：獨家代理可發通知終止。

question_en: With regard to Polly’s payment of the deposit o f $50,000 in cash, which of the following are the requirements that Smart Agency sh ould have complied with under the Practice Regulation? (i) Issue a written receipt to Polly acknowledging receipt of the $50,000. (ii) Deposit the $50,000 in a trust account Smart A gency maintained with a bank. (iii) Provide Polly with a copy of the paid-in slip for the deposit of the $50,000 into an office account maintained by Smart Agency at a bank. (iv) Use the $50,000 as partial payment of the comm ission by Mr. Wan to Smart Agency and issue a written receipt to Mr. Wan.
question_cn:
就Polly以現金支付$50,000訂金一事，以下哪些是Smart Agency根據《常規規例》應遵守的要求？
(i) 向Polly發出書面收據，確認收到$50,000。
(ii) 將$50,000存入Smart Agency在銀行開設的信託賬戶。
(iii) 向Polly提供將$50,000存入Smart Agency在銀行開設的辦公室賬戶的存款單副本。
(iv) 將$50,000用作溫先生向Smart Agency支付佣金的部分付款，並向溫先生發出書面收據。
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation, when receiving a deposit the agent must: (i) issue a written receipt to the payer, and (ii) deposit it into a trust account (not an office account). Using the deposit as commission (iv) is improper, and depositing into an office account (iii) instead of trust account is wrong.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》，收取訂金時代理必須：(i) 向付款人發出書面收據；及 (ii) 存入信託賬戶（而非辦公室賬戶）。將訂金用作佣金 (iv) 屬不當行為，存入辦公室賬戶 (iii) 而非信託賬戶亦屬不正確。

question_en: Which of the following acts of Edith might have breached the Estate Agents Ordinance and/or Practice Regulation and/or Code of Ethics? (i) Edith advised Mr. Wan that he could terminate t he exclusive agency agreement with Bright Agency and hence would not be liable to pay any commission to Bright Agency. (ii) Edith agreed not to mention the Building Order in the Property Information Form (Form 1). (iii) Edith told Mr. Wan that Polly offered to purc hase the Property at $6.3 million. (iv) Edith advised Mr. Wan to stipulate in the Prov isional Agreement that he should deliver vacant possession of the Property to the purchaser on completion.
question_cn:
以下Edith的哪些行為可能違反《地產代理條例》及／或《常規規例》及／或《操守守則》？
(i) Edith建議溫先生他可以終止與明亮代理的獨家代理協議，因此無需向明亮代理支付任何佣金。
(ii) Edith同意不在物業資料表格（表格1）中提及建築命令。
(iii) Edith告知溫先生Polly提出以$630萬購買該物業。
(iv) Edith建議溫先生在臨時合約中訂明他應在交易完成時向買方交付空置管有的物業。
explanation_en: Edith may have breached the law by: (i) advising termination of exclusive agency with no commission liability (potentially incorrect - commission may still be payable), and (ii) agreeing to omit the Building Order from Form 1 (breach of disclosure requirement). Reporting Polly's offer (iii) and advising on vacant possession (iv) are proper practices.
explanation_cn: Edith可能因以下行為違法：(i) 建議終止獨家代理且無需付佣（可能不正確——佣金仍可能須付）；及 (ii) 同意不在表格1提及建築命令（違反披露要求）。告知出價 (iii) 及建議空置管有 (iv) 均屬正當行為。

question_en: As Polly’s agent, Sunny should have advised Polly o n which of the following matters? (i) A debt-collection company would be appointed by Smart Agency if the commission was not paid by a certain date. (ii) The Property was subject to a building order. (iii) The Property was subject to a memorandum of c harge. (iv) The deposit should be stakeheld by a firm of s olicitors.
question_cn:
作為Polly的代理，Sunny應就以下哪些事項向Polly提供建議？
(i) 如佣金未於某日期前繳付，Smart Agency將委託收數公司追收。
(ii) 該物業受建築命令影響。
(iii) 該物業受押記備忘錄影響。
(iv) 訂金應由一間律師行以權益關係人身份持有。
explanation_en: Sunny should have advised Polly about: (ii) the building order, (iii) the memorandum of charge, and (iv) that the deposit should be stakeheld by solicitors. These are material matters for the buyer. Debt collection arrangements (i) are internal agency matters, not something to advise the buyer about.
explanation_cn: Sunny應就以下事項向Polly提供建議：(ii) 建築命令；(iii) 押記備忘錄；及 (iv) 訂金應由律師行持有。這些均為買方重要事項。收數安排 (i) 屬代理內部事務，並非須向買方提供建議的事項。

question_en: Which of the following matters should Mr. Wan a ttend to on the day of completion in order to deliver vacant possession of the Property to Polly? (i) Ensure that all chattels not sold together with the Property are removed from the Property. (ii) Ensure that no occupier stays in the Property. (iii) Deliver the keys of the Property to Polly. (iv) Change the electricity account to Polly’s name .
question_cn:
為向Polly交付空置管有的物業，溫先生於成交當日應處理以下哪些事項？
(i) 確保所有不隨物業出售的動產已從物業中移走。
(ii) 確保物業內無人佔用。
(iii) 將物業的鑰匙交付予Polly。
(iv) 將電力賬戶轉至Polly名下。
explanation_en: To deliver vacant possession, Mr. Wan must: (i) remove all chattels not included in the sale, (ii) ensure no occupier remains, and (iii) deliver the keys. Changing the electricity account (iv) is not part of vacant possession; it is an administrative matter the buyer handles after completion.
explanation_cn: 為交付空置管有，溫先生必須：(i) 移走不包括在出售中的動產；(ii) 確保無人佔用；及 (iii) 交付鑰匙。轉換電力賬戶 (iv) 並非空置管有的一部分，是買方在成交後處理的行政事務。

question_en: Which of the following acts of Smart Agency mig ht have breached the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance when it instructed a debt- collection company to recover the outstanding agency commission from Poll y? (i) Smart Agency provided the address of the Proper ty to the debt-collection company. (ii) Smart Agency passed a copy of Polly’s identity card to the debt-collection company. (iii) Smart Agency informed the debt-collection com pany about the amount of the commission due and owing by Polly. (iv) Smart Agency provided the telephone number of Polly’s mother to the debt-collection company.
question_cn:
Smart Agency委託收數公司向Polly追收未付代理佣金時，以下哪些行為可能違反《個人資料（私隱）條例》？
(i) Smart Agency向收數公司提供該物業的地址。
(ii) Smart Agency將Polly的身份證副本轉交收數公司。
(iii) Smart Agency告知收數公司Polly尚欠佣金的金額。
(iv) Smart Agency向收數公司提供Polly母親的電話號碼。
explanation_en: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance, passing Polly's ID card copy (ii) and her mother's phone number (iv) to the debt-collection company likely breach the Ordinance as they exceed what is necessary and involve third-party data. Providing the property address (i) and commission amount (iii) are reasonably necessary for debt recovery.
explanation_cn: 根據《個人資料（私隱）條例》，將Polly的身份證副本 (ii) 及其母親電話號碼 (iv) 轉交收數公司可能違反條例，因超出必要範圍且涉及第三方資料。提供物業地址 (i) 及佣金金額 (iii) 為追收債務屬合理必要。

question_en:
Which of the following documents must be made by deed?

(I) A lease for more than three years
(II) An assignment of property
(III) A power of attorney
(IV) A tenancy agreement for two years at market rent
question_cn:
以下哪些文件必須以契據形式訂立？

(I) 超過三年的租約
(II) 物業轉讓契
(III) 授權書
(IV) 以市值租金訂立的兩年期租賃協議
explanation_en: Under Part 3 para 2, documents that must be by deed include: a lease for more than three years, an assignment, and a mortgage. All powers of attorney must also be created by deed. A tenancy for not more than three years at market rent without a premium is exempt from the writing requirements under Section 6(2) of the CPO and does not need to be by deed.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第2段，必須以契據形式訂立的文件包括：超過三年的租約、轉讓契及按揭。所有授權書亦必須以契據形式設立。根據《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 6(2)，不超過三年、以市值租金且無繳付溢價的租賃，可獲豁免書面形式的要求，無需以契據形式訂立。

question_en:
Which of the following are essential elements for the formation of a valid contract?

(I) Offer
(II) Acceptance
(III) Consideration
(IV) Intention to create legal relation
(V) Written form
question_cn:
以下哪些是構成有效合約的必要元素？

(I) 要約
(II) 承約
(III) 代價
(IV) 建立法律關係的意圖
(V) 書面形式
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 3, the four essential elements of a contract are: (1) offer, (2) acceptance, (3) consideration, and (4) intention to create legal relation. Written form is NOT a general requirement for all contracts, though it is required for certain contracts such as land contracts under Section 3 of the CPO.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第3段，合約的四個必要元素為：(1) 要約、(2) 承約、(3) 代價、及 (4) 建立法律關係的意圖。書面形式並非所有合約的一般要求，惟根據《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 3，某些合約（如土地合約）則須以書面形式訂立。

question_en: Mr. Chan verbally agrees to sell his flat to Ms. Wong for $5 million. No written agreement is made. Which of the following statements is CORRECT?
question_cn: 陳先生口頭同意以$500萬將其單位出售予黃女士。雙方並無訂立書面合約。以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: The contract is valid and fully enforceable
options_en.B: The contract is void ab initio
options_en.C: The contract is not enforceable under Section 3(1) of the CPO, but Ms. Wong may seek specific performance on the basis of part performance
options_en.D: The contract is enforceable because verbal contracts for land are always valid in Hong Kong
options_en.E: The contract is only enforceable if Ms. Wong pays a deposit

options_cn.A: 該合約有效且完全可強制執行
options_cn.C: 根據《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 3(1)，該合約不可強制執行，但黃女士可基於部分履行而尋求強制履行令
options_cn.D: 該合約可強制執行，因為在香港，口頭的土地合約一律有效
options_cn.E: 該合約只有在黃女士支付訂金後才可強制執行

explanation_en: Under Section 3(1) of the CPO (Part 3 para 11), no action can be brought upon a contract for the sale of land unless it is in writing or evidenced by a memorandum signed by the party to be charged. However, Section 3(2) preserves the doctrine of part performance, allowing a party who has performed obligations under the unenforceable agreement to seek specific performance (Part 3 para 13).
explanation_cn: 根據《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 3(1)（第3部分第11段），除非合約以書面形式訂立或有經被控一方簽署的備忘錄作為證據，否則不得就土地買賣合約提出訴訟。然而，Section 3(2) 保留了部分履行原則，容許已按不可強制執行的協議履行義務的一方尋求強制履行令（第3部分第13段）。

question_en: In a property sale, the purchaser pays a deposit of 15% of the purchase price. If the purchaser defaults, what is the likely outcome regarding the deposit?
question_cn: 在物業買賣中，買方繳付了相當於樓價15%的訂金。如買方違約，關於該訂金的可能結果是什麼？

options_en.A: The vendor can forfeit the entire 15% deposit
options_en.B: The vendor can forfeit only 10% and must return 5%
options_en.C: The deposit of 15% is likely to be treated as a penalty and the vendor cannot forfeit any of it, but must sue for actual loss
options_en.D: The vendor can forfeit 15% only with court approval
options_en.E: The deposit automatically becomes liquidated damages

options_cn.C: 15%的訂金很可能被視為罰款，賣方不能沒收任何部分，而須就實際損失提出訴訟
options_cn.D: 賣方只有在獲得法院批准後才能沒收15%
options_cn.E: 該訂金自動成為經議定的損害賠償

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 21, courts have decided that a deposit in sale of land represents 10% of the purchase price. Any deposit more than 10% will likely be treated as a penalty and cannot be forfeited. In such a case, on the purchaser's default, the vendor cannot keep any of the deposit and must go to court to sue for actual loss.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第21段，法院裁定土地買賣中的訂金為樓價的10%。任何超過10%的訂金很可能被視為罰款而不能被沒收。在此情況下，如買方違約，賣方不能保留任何訂金，而須向法院提出訴訟以追討實際損失。

question_en: Regarding the concept of consideration in contract law, which of the following statements is INCORRECT?
question_cn: 關於合約法中代價的概念，以下哪項陳述是不正確的？

options_en.C: Consideration must be adequate and equivalent to the value received
options_en.D: Part payment of a debt cannot discharge the remaining debt
options_en.E: A contract by deed is enforceable without consideration

options_cn.C: 代價必須充分且相當於所收取的價值
options_cn.D: 部分償付債務不能解除餘下的債務
options_cn.E: 以契據形式訂立的合約無需代價即可強制執行

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 6, consideration needs to be of value but does NOT have to be equivalent to the thing received. The court is not concerned with the adequacy of the consideration or bargain. A sale of property at a price substantially below market price is still good consideration. All other statements are correct as stated in the study guide.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第6段，代價須具有價值，但無需相當於所收取之物的價值。法院不會關注代價或交易是否充分。以大幅低於市場價格出售物業仍屬有效代價。其他所有陳述均為溫習指南中所述的正確內容。

question_en: In Shum Kong & Ors v Chui Ting Lin & Ors [2001], the court held that the vendors' conduct amounted to misrepresentation because:
question_cn: 在 Shum Kong & Ors v Chui Ting Lin & Ors [2001] 案中，法院裁定賣方的行為構成失實陳述，原因是：

options_en.A: The vendors made a false oral statement about the property size
options_en.B: The vendors' silence about a short-term tenancy over the garage and garden created a false impression that they were included in the sale
options_en.C: The estate agent provided an incorrect floor plan
options_en.D: The vendors deliberately inflated the property price
options_en.E: The vendors failed to disclose the existence of a mortgage

options_cn.A: 賣方就物業面積作出虛假的口頭陳述
options_cn.B: 賣方對車庫及花園的短期租約保持沉默，造成車庫及花園包括在出售範圍內的虛假印象
options_cn.C: 地產代理提供了不正確的平面圖
options_cn.D: 賣方故意抬高物業價格
options_cn.E: 賣方未有披露按揭的存在

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 24, in this case the garage and garden were on government land held by short-term tenancy that could not be assigned. Neither the vendors nor the estate agent told the purchasers about this. The court held this silence amounted to misrepresentation because it created the impression that the sale included the house, garage and garden. The purchasers were able to rescind the contract.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第24段，在此案中，車庫和花園位於以短期租約持有的政府土地上，該租約不可轉讓。賣方和地產代理均沒有告知買方此事。法院裁定此沉默構成失實陳述，因為它造成了買賣包括房屋、車庫和花園的印象。買方得以撤銷合約。

question_en:
Which of the following correctly describes the three types of misrepresentation?

(I) Fraudulent - the representor makes a false statement knowingly or recklessly
(II) Negligent - wrong advice is given causing loss to the representee
(III) Innocent - the representor has reasonable grounds for believing the statement is true
(IV) Criminal - the representor intends to commit fraud
question_cn:
以下哪項正確描述了三種失實陳述的類型？

(I) 欺詐性——陳述人明知或罔顧地作出虛假陳述
(II) 疏忽——給予錯誤的建議而導致被陳述人蒙受損失
(III) 無辜——陳述人有合理理由相信陳述屬實
(IV) 刑事——陳述人意圖進行欺詐
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 25, misrepresentation may be fraudulent (false statement made knowingly, without belief in its truth, or recklessly), negligent (wrong or defective advice causing loss), or innocent (false statement made with reasonable grounds for believing it true). There is no separate category of 'criminal' misrepresentation in the study guide.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第25段，失實陳述可分為欺詐性（明知虛假、不相信其真實性或罔顧地作出）、疏忽（給予錯誤或有缺陷的建議而導致損失）或無辜（有合理理由相信陳述屬實而作出虛假陳述）。溫習指南中並無「刑事」失實陳述這一獨立類別。

question_en: An estate agent advises a client that the asking price for the client's property should be $3 million. The client sells at that price but the true market value was $4 million. Which of the following is CORRECT regarding the client's potential claim?
question_cn: 一名地產代理建議客戶其物業的叫價應為$300萬。客戶以該價格出售，但真實市場價值為$400萬。以下哪項關於客戶潛在索償的陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: The client has no claim because estate agents are not professionals
options_en.B: The client may sue for negligent misstatement because the agent has special knowledge of the property market and the client relied on the advice
options_en.C: The client can only claim if there is a written contract with the agent
options_en.D: The client must prove the agent acted fraudulently
options_en.E: The client cannot claim because property valuations are always opinions

options_cn.A: 客戶無權索償，因為地產代理不是專業人士
options_cn.B: 客戶可就疏忽失實陳述提出訴訟，因為代理對物業市場具有專業知識，而客戶依賴了該建議
options_cn.C: 只有在客戶與代理有書面合約的情況下，客戶才能索償
options_cn.D: 客戶必須證明代理存在欺詐行為
options_cn.E: 客戶不能索償，因為物業估值始終屬意見性質

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 34, a client who seeks advice from an estate agent about pricing may be able to sue if the advice is wrong and the client suffers loss. This is because the agent should have special knowledge of the property market, the agent knows the client would act on such advice, the client did act on it and suffered loss, and it was reasonable for the client to seek and act on the advice.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第34段，向地產代理就定價尋求建議的客戶，如建議錯誤且客戶蒙受損失，可能有權提出訴訟。原因是代理應對物業市場具有專業知識、代理知悉客戶會依據該建議行事、客戶確實依據建議行事並蒙受損失，而且客戶尋求並依據該建議行事是合理的。

question_en:
For an action in tort of negligence to succeed, the plaintiff must prove:

(I) The defendant owes a duty of care to the plaintiff
(II) The defendant breaches that duty
(III) The plaintiff suffers foreseeable loss or damage
(IV) There is a contractual relationship between the parties
question_cn:
就疏忽侵權行為而言，原告人必須證明：

(I) 被告人對原告人負有謹慎責任
(II) 被告人違反了該責任
(III) 原告人遭受了可合理預見的損失或損害
(IV) 雙方之間存在合約關係
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 26, the three basic elements of negligence are: the defendant owes a duty of care, the defendant breaches that duty, and the plaintiff suffers foreseeable loss or damage. Importantly, per para 27, no contract between the parties is needed for an action in tort of negligence.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第26段，疏忽的三個基本元素為：被告人負有謹慎責任、被告人違反了該責任、以及原告人遭受了可合理預見的損失或損害。重要的是，根據第27段，就疏忽侵權行為提出訴訟無需雙方之間存在合約關係。

question_en: Under Section 4 of the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (CPO), which of the following is CORRECT?
question_cn: 根據《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 4，以下哪項是正確的？

options_en.A: A legal estate in land can be created by a simple written contract
options_en.B: A legal estate in land can be created only by deed
options_en.C: A legal estate in land can be created orally if witnessed
options_en.D: A legal estate in land can be created by any instrument in writing
options_en.E: A legal estate in land is automatically created upon payment of consideration

options_cn.A: 土地的法律產業權可透過簡單的書面合約設立
options_cn.B: 土地的法律產業權只能以契據形式設立
options_cn.C: 土地的法律產業權可在有見證人的情況下以口頭方式設立
options_cn.D: 土地的法律產業權可透過任何書面文書設立
options_cn.E: 土地的法律產業權在支付代價後自動設立

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 14 and 35, Section 4 of the CPO provides that a legal estate in land can be created only by deed. The contract alone will not give the purchaser legal title to the land.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第14及35段，《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 4 規定土地的法律產業權只能以契據形式設立。僅有合約不會賦予買方土地的法律業權。

question_en:
Under Section 6(2) of the CPO, a lease created by parol (orally) will be valid as a proprietary interest in land if:

(I) The term does not exceed three years
(II) The tenant is in possession
(III) It is at the best rent reasonably obtainable
(IV) No premium is paid
question_cn:
根據《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 6(2)，以口頭方式（parol）設立的租約，如符合以下條件，將作為土地的財產權益而有效：

(I) 年期不超過三年
(II) 租客處於管有狀態
(III) 以合理可得的最佳租金出租
(IV) 無繳付溢價
explanation_en: Per Part 3 paras 37-38, Section 6(2) of the CPO provides that the writing requirements in Sections 3 and 5 do not affect the creation by parol of leases taking effect in possession for a term not exceeding three years at the best rent reasonably obtainable without a premium. All four conditions must be met for the tenancy to be valid as a proprietary interest.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第37至38段，《物業轉易及財產條例》Section 6(2) 規定，Sections 3 及 5 的書面形式要求不影響以口頭方式設立的、以管有方式生效的、年期不超過三年、以合理可得的最佳租金且無繳付溢價的租約。所有四項條件均須符合，該租賃方可作為有效的財產權益。

question_en:
Consider the following scenario regarding registration priority under the LRO:

SPA A: Executed 1 Jan, Registered 15 Feb
SPA B: Executed 4 Jan, Registered 31 Jan
SPA C: Executed 3 Jan, Registered 10 Feb

What is the order of priority from highest to lowest?
question_cn:
就《土地註冊條例》下的登記優先次序，考慮以下情景：

買賣合約A：1月1日簽立，2月15日註冊
買賣合約B：1月4日簽立，1月31日註冊
買賣合約C：1月3日簽立，2月10日註冊

由最高至最低的優先次序是什麼？
explanation_en: Per Part 3 paras 41-42, if an instrument is registered within one month from execution, priority dates from execution. If registered more than one month after execution, priority dates from registration. SPA B was executed 4 Jan and registered 31 Jan (within one month), so priority is from 4 Jan. SPA A was executed 1 Jan but registered 15 Feb (more than one month later), so priority is from 15 Feb. SPA C was executed 3 Jan and registered 10 Feb (more than one month later), so priority is from 10 Feb. Order: B (4 Jan) > C (10 Feb) > A (15 Feb).
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第41至42段，如文書在簽立後一個月內註冊，優先次序由簽立日期起算。如在簽立後超過一個月才註冊，優先次序由註冊日期起算。買賣合約B於1月4日簽立，1月31日註冊（一個月內），故優先次序由1月4日起算。買賣合約A於1月1日簽立，但2月15日才註冊（超過一個月），故優先次序由2月15日起算。買賣合約C於1月3日簽立，2月10日註冊（超過一個月），故優先次序由2月10日起算。次序為：B（1月4日）> C（2月10日）> A（2月15日）。

question_en: Under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO), which of the following is NOT one of the six data protection principles?
question_cn: 根據《個人資料（私隱）條例》，以下哪項並非六項保障資料原則之一？

options_en.A: Purpose and manner of collection of personal data
options_en.C: Automatic deletion of data after seven years
options_en.E: Access to and correction of personal data by the data subject

options_cn.A: 收集個人資料的目的及方式
options_cn.C: 資料在七年後自動刪除
options_cn.E: 資料當事人查閱及改正個人資料的權利

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 49, the six principles are: (1) purpose and manner of collection, (2) accuracy, (3) use limited to original purpose, (4) security, (5) openness of policies and practices, and (6) data subject's right to access and correct data. There is no principle requiring automatic deletion after seven years.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第49段，六項原則為：(1) 收集的目的及方式、(2) 準確性、(3) 使用須限於原來目的、(4) 保安、(5) 政策及慣例的公開性、以及 (6) 資料當事人查閱及改正資料的權利。並無要求資料在七年後自動刪除的原則。

question_en:
Under Part VIA of the PDPO, when an estate agency uses a client's personal data for direct marketing for the first time, it must:

(I) Obtain the necessary consent from the data subject before using the data
(II) Inform the data subject of the opt-out right
(III) Cease using the data without charge upon receiving an opt-out request
(IV) Pay a fee to the Privacy Commissioner
question_cn:
根據《個人資料（私隱）條例》第VIA部，當地產代理首次使用客戶的個人資料作直接促銷用途時，必須：

(I) 在使用資料前取得資料當事人的必要同意
(II) 告知資料當事人拒絕的權利
(III) 在收到拒絕要求後，免費停止使用該資料
(IV) 向私隱專員繳付費用
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 50, when using personal data for direct marketing, the data user must: obtain consent before using the data, inform the data subject of the opt-out right when using the data for the first time, and cease using the data without charge upon an opt-out request. There is no requirement to pay a fee to the Privacy Commissioner.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第50段，在使用個人資料作直接促銷用途時，資料使用者必須：在使用資料前取得同意、在首次使用資料時告知資料當事人拒絕的權利、以及在收到拒絕要求後免費停止使用該資料。並無向私隱專員繳付費用的要求。

question_en: Under Section 9 of the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (PBO), an estate agent employed by a firm accepts a cash reward from a developer without the permission of his employer for recommending clients to purchase the developer's properties. Which of the following is CORRECT?
question_cn: 根據《防止賄賂條例》Section 9，一名受僱於地產代理公司的地產代理在未經其僱主許可的情況下，因向客戶推薦購買某發展商的物業而接受該發展商的現金報酬。以下哪項是正確的？

options_en.A: This is not an offence because it is a private sector transaction
options_en.B: Only the agent commits an offence, not the developer
options_en.C: Both the agent and the developer who offered the reward commit an offence
options_en.D: This is acceptable as long as the amount is less than $500
options_en.E: This is only an offence if the agent is a public servant

options_cn.A: 這並非罪行，因為這是私營機構的交易
options_cn.B: 只有該代理觸犯罪行，發展商則不然
options_cn.C: 該代理及提供報酬的發展商均觸犯罪行
options_cn.D: 只要金額少於$500，這是可接受的
options_cn.E: 只有在該代理為公務員的情況下才構成罪行

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 57, Section 9(1) of the PBO makes it an offence for an agent to solicit or accept an advantage without the permission of his principal. Section 9(2) makes it an offence for anyone to offer such an advantage. The agent's principal includes both the employer (estate agency firm) and the client. Both parties commit an offence.
explanation_cn: 根據第3部分第57段，《防止賄賂條例》Section 9(1) 規定，代理人在未經其委託人許可下索取或接受利益屬刑事罪行。Section 9(2) 規定，任何人提供該利益亦屬罪行。代理人的委託人包括僱主（地產代理公司）及客戶。雙方均觸犯罪行。

question_en: Under the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance, which of the following is EXCLUDED from the definition of 'advantage'?
question_cn: 根據《防止賄賂條例》，以下哪項不屬於「利益」的定義範圍？

options_en.B: Entertainment (food and drink for immediate consumption)

options_cn.B: 款待（供即時享用的食物及飲品）

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 55, 'advantage' under the PBO covers almost anything of value EXCEPT entertainment. Entertainment means the provision of food and drink for immediate consumption and any other entertainment connected with such provision (e.g. a floor show during dinner).
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第55段，《防止賄賂條例》下的「利益」涵蓋幾乎所有有價值的東西，唯獨「款待」除外。款待是指提供供即時享用的食物及飲品，以及與此有關的其他款待（例如晚餐期間的表演節目）。

question_en: Under the Housing Ordinance, what is the penalty for selling or disposing of an HOS/TPS flat before payment of the assessed premium?
question_cn: 根據《房屋條例》，在繳付經評定的補價前出售或處置居屋/私人參建居屋計劃單位，會受到甚麼處罰？

options_en.B: A fine of $500,000 and imprisonment for one year, and the sale is void
options_en.C: A fine of $1,000,000 and imprisonment for two years
options_en.D: A warning from the Housing Authority only
options_en.E: The transaction is voidable at the Housing Authority's option

options_cn.B: 罰款$500,000及監禁一年，而該出售亦屬無效
options_cn.E: 該交易可由房屋委員會選擇使其無效

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 46, any person who sells or otherwise disposes of their HOS/TPS property before payment of the assessed premium commits an offence under the HO and is liable on conviction to a fine of $500,000 and imprisonment for one year, and such sale or disposal will also be void.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第46段，任何人在繳付經評定的補價前出售或以其他方式處置其居屋/私人參建居屋計劃物業，即屬違反《房屋條例》的罪行，一經定罪，可處罰款$500,000及監禁一年，而該出售或處置亦屬無效。

question_en: Regarding a Provisional Agreement for Sale and Purchase (PASP), which of the following statements is CORRECT?
question_cn: 關於臨時買賣合約（PASP），以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: A PASP is never legally binding because it is only 'provisional'
options_en.B: A PASP is generally a binding agreement enforceable on its terms
options_en.C: A PASP only becomes binding after the formal SPA is signed
options_en.D: A PASP is binding only if drafted by a solicitor
options_en.E: A PASP is only binding if registered in the Land Registry

options_cn.A: 臨時買賣合約因只屬「臨時」性質，故從不具法律約束力
options_cn.B: 臨時買賣合約一般是具約束力的協議，可按其條款強制執行
options_cn.C: 臨時買賣合約只在正式買賣合約簽署後才具約束力
options_cn.D: 臨時買賣合約只有由律師起草才具約束力
options_cn.E: 臨時買賣合約只有在土地註冊處註冊後才具約束力

explanation_en: Per Part 3 paras 9 and 65, although called 'provisional', the PASP is generally a binding agreement enforceable on its terms. In DH Shuttlecocks Ltd v Keung Shiu Tang [1993], the court held that even though the word 'provisional' was included, the PASP represented a fully binding contract. If parties cannot agree on the formal SPA, the PASP remains in force.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第9及65段，雖然稱為「臨時」，但臨時買賣合約一般是具約束力的協議，可按其條款強制執行。在DH Shuttlecocks Ltd v Keung Shiu Tang [1993]案中，法庭裁定即使文件包含「臨時」一詞，該臨時買賣合約仍代表一份完全具約束力的合約。如雙方未能就正式買賣合約達成協議，臨時買賣合約仍然有效。

question_en: In a typical PASP, the initial deposit is usually what percentage of the purchase price?
question_cn: 在典型的臨時買賣合約中，初期訂金通常為購買價的百分之幾？
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 66, the initial deposit is usually 1-5% of the purchase price and is usually payable by the purchaser to the vendor upon signing the PASP. The initial deposit and the balance of the deposit (payable on signing the formal SPA) will usually add up to 10% of the purchase price.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第66段，初期訂金通常為購買價的1-5%，通常由買方在簽署臨時買賣合約時支付給賣方。初期訂金與餘額訂金（於簽署正式買賣合約時支付）合計通常為購買價的10%。

question_en: Under a typical SPA, immediately after signing, the risk of the property passes to:
question_cn: 根據典型的買賣合約，簽署後物業風險即時轉移至：
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 68 (SPA terms), unless the SPA provides otherwise, immediately after the signing of the SPA, the property will be at the purchaser's risk. A prudent purchaser should take out proper insurance coverage on the property for his protection.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第68段（買賣合約條款），除非買賣合約另有規定，在簽署買賣合約後，物業風險即由買方承擔。謹慎的買方應為物業購買適當的保險以保障自身利益。

question_en: What is the penalty for late stamping of a document where the delay exceeds two months?
question_cn: 文件逾期加蓋印花而延誤超過兩個月的罰款是多少？
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 95, the penalty for late stamping is: 2 times the duty where the delay does not exceed one month; 4 times the duty where the delay exceeds one month but not two months; and 10 times the duty in all other cases (delay exceeding two months).
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第95段，逾期加蓋印花的罰款為：延誤不超過一個月，罰款為稅款的2倍；延誤超過一個月但不超過兩個月，罰款為稅款的4倍；其他情況（延誤超過兩個月），罰款為稅款的10倍。

question_en: Regarding the Buyer's Stamp Duty (BSD), which of the following statements is CORRECT?
question_cn: 關於買家印花稅（BSD），以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: BSD applies to all property transactions in Hong Kong
options_en.B: BSD is charged at 15% on residential properties acquired by any person except a Hong Kong Permanent Resident
options_en.C: BSD replaces the ad valorem stamp duty
options_en.D: BSD is charged at 10% on all non-residential properties
options_en.E: BSD only applies to properties valued above $5 million

options_cn.A: 買家印花稅適用於香港所有物業交易
options_cn.B: 買家印花稅按15%的劃一稅率，向香港永久性居民以外的任何人士就住宅物業徵收
options_cn.C: 買家印花稅取代從價印花稅
options_cn.D: 買家印花稅按10%稅率對所有非住宅物業徵收
options_cn.E: 買家印花稅只適用於價值超過$5,000,000的物業

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 97, BSD is charged at a flat rate of 15% on all residential properties acquired by any person (including a company) except a Hong Kong Permanent Resident. BSD is charged on top of the existing stamp duty and the special stamp duty, if applicable.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第97段，買家印花稅按劃一稅率15%，向香港永久性居民以外的任何人士（包括公司）就住宅物業徵收。買家印花稅是在現有印花稅及額外印花稅（如適用）之上加徵的。

question_en:
In calculating net assessable value for property tax purposes, which deductions are allowed?

(I) Rates paid by the owner
(II) 20% of assessable value (after deducting rates) as allowance for repairs and outgoings
(III) Mortgage interest payments
(IV) Management fees paid by the owner
question_cn:
在計算物業稅的應評稅淨值時，可扣除哪些項目？

(I) 業主繳付的差餉
(II) 應評稅值（扣除差餉後）的20%作為修葺及支出的免稅額
(III) 按揭利息支出
(IV) 業主繳付的管理費
explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 99, the net assessable value is calculated by deducting from the assessable value: (1) the rates paid by the owner, and (2) 20% of the assessable value (after deduction of rates) as a 'broad-brush' allowance for repairs and outgoings. Mortgage interest and management fees are not separately deductible.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第99段，應評稅淨值的計算方法是從應評稅值中扣除：(1) 業主繳付的差餉，及(2) 應評稅值（扣除差餉後）的20%，作為修葺及支出的「概括性」免稅額。按揭利息及管理費不能另行扣除。

question_en: A mortgagor lets his mortgaged property to a tenant without obtaining the mortgagee's prior written consent. What is the legal consequence for the tenant?
question_cn: 按揭人在未取得承按人事先書面同意的情況下，將已按揭的物業出租予租客。該租客的法律後果是甚麼？

options_en.A: The tenant has full legal protection under the tenancy
options_en.B: The tenant is a trespasser as against the mortgagee
options_en.D: The mortgagee must accept the tenancy
options_en.E: The tenant can claim compensation from the mortgagee

options_cn.A: 租客在租約下享有完全的法律保障
options_cn.B: 租客對承按人而言屬擅自佔用者
options_cn.D: 承按人必須接受該租約

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 83, most mortgage deeds contain a negative pledge where the mortgagor covenants not to part with the use, occupation or possession of the property without the mortgagee's prior written consent. If consent is not sought and obtained, the tenant is a trespasser as against the mortgagee.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第83段，大多數按揭契約載有消極承諾條款，按揭人承諾未經承按人事先書面同意，不得轉讓物業的使用、佔用或管有權。如未徵得並獲得同意，租客對承按人而言屬擅自佔用者。

question_en: In a sub-sale (confirmor sale), if the principal agreement specifies completion at or before 5:00pm, at what time should the sub-sale agreement typically specify completion?
question_cn: 在確認人轉售（摸貨交易）中，如果主合約指定在下午5時或之前完成交易，轉售合約通常應指定在甚麼時間完成？

options_en.A: At or before 5:00pm on the same day
options_en.B: At or before 2:30pm on the same day
options_en.C: At or before 12:00 noon on the same day
options_en.D: One day before the principal agreement completion
options_en.E: At or before 9:30am on the same day

options_cn.D: 主合約完成日期前一天

explanation_en: Per Part 3 para 74, completion of the sub-sale should take place on the same completion date but at a slightly earlier time. If the principal agreement completion time is 5:00pm, the sub-sale completion time is usually at or before 2:30pm. This allows the confirmor's solicitors sufficient time to deliver the balance of the purchase price to the vendor's solicitors by 5:00pm.
explanation_cn: 根據第三部分第74段，轉售交易應在同一完成日期但較早的時間完成。如果主合約的完成時間為下午5時，轉售交易的完成時間通常為下午2時30分或之前。這讓確認人的律師有足夠時間在下午5時前將購買價餘額交付予賣方的律師。

question_en: Under Hong Kong's deeds registration system, which of the following statements is CORRECT?
question_cn: 在香港的契約註冊制度下，以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.C: Registration is only a record of claims to land or interests in land, and does not create title
options_en.D: A registered deed is always valid and cannot be challenged
options_en.E: Only solicitors can register documents at the Land Registry

options_cn.B: 註冊能確定性地證明擁有權
options_cn.C: 註冊只是土地權益或土地利益的申索記錄，並不產生業權
options_cn.D: 已註冊的契約永遠有效且不可被質疑
options_cn.E: 只有律師才能在土地註冊處登記文件

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 2, under a deeds registration system, ownership cannot be proved conclusively as a deed may be forged or defective. Registration does not create title and does not cause the instrument to gain validity. The register is only a record of claims to the estate or interests in the land.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第2段，在契約註冊制度下，擁有權不能確定性地被證明，因為契約可能是偽造或有缺陷的。註冊不會產生業權，亦不會使文書取得效力。註冊紀錄只是對土地的產業權或權益的申索記錄。

question_en: Under Section 4 of the LRO, regarding a prior unregistered but registrable interest, which of the following is CORRECT?
question_cn: 根據《土地註冊條例》Section 4，關於先前未註冊但可予註冊的權益，以下哪項是正確的？

options_en.A: A party who knows about a prior unregistered interest cannot obtain priority by registering later
options_en.B: A party who registers takes priority even if he knows about a prior, registrable but unregistered interest
options_en.C: Prior unregistered interests always take priority regardless of registration
options_en.D: The court will determine priority based on fairness
options_en.E: The earlier date of execution always determines priority

options_cn.A: 知悉先前未註冊權益的一方不能藉後來註冊而取得優先權
options_cn.B: 已註冊的一方即使知悉先前可予註冊但未註冊的權益，仍可取得優先權
options_cn.C: 先前未註冊的權益無論是否已註冊，均享有優先權
options_cn.D: 法庭會根據公平原則決定優先權
options_cn.E: 較早的簽立日期永遠決定優先權

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 3, Section 4 of the LRO provides that no notice can be taken of a prior unregistered but registrable interest. This means a party who registers takes priority even if he knows about a prior, registrable but unregistered interest. This is noted as an unusual provision because most registration systems prevent this.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第3段，《土地註冊條例》Section 4規定，先前未註冊但可予註冊的權益不得被考慮在內。這意味着即使一方知悉先前可予註冊但未註冊的權益，只要其已註冊便可取得優先權。這是一項不尋常的條文，因為大多數註冊制度會防止這種情況。

question_en: Under Section 5 of the LRO, if an instrument is registered within one month of execution, priority is determined from:
question_cn: 根據《土地註冊條例》Section 5，如果文書在簽立後一個月內註冊，優先權由何時起計算？

options_en.D: The date it was lodged at the Land Registry
options_en.E: The date the memorial was signed

options_cn.D: 送交土地註冊處的日期

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 3, Section 5 of the LRO provides that if an instrument is registered within one month of execution, then priority is back-dated to the date of the instrument. If registered more than one month after execution, priority runs from the date of registration.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第3段，《土地註冊條例》Section 5規定，如果文書在簽立後一個月內註冊，優先權追溯至文書日期。如果在簽立後超過一個月才註冊，優先權由註冊日期起計算。

question_en: The land register for each property is divided into how many sections, and which of the following is NOT one of them?
question_cn: 每項物業的土地登記冊分為多少個部分？以下哪項不是其中之一？

options_en.A: Four sections; 'Valuation Details' is not one of them
options_en.B: Three sections; 'Deeds Pending Registration' is not one of them
options_en.C: Five sections; 'Tax Assessment' is not one of them
options_en.D: Four sections; 'Owner Particulars' is not one of them
options_en.E: Two sections; 'Incumbrances' is not one of them

options_cn.A: 四個部分；「估值詳情」不是其中之一
options_cn.B: 三個部分；「待註冊契約」不是其中之一
options_cn.C: 五個部分；「稅務評估」不是其中之一
options_cn.D: 四個部分；「業主詳情」不是其中之一
options_cn.E: 兩個部分；「產權負擔」不是其中之一

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 7, each land register is divided into four sections: (1) Property Particulars, (2) Owner Particulars, (3) Incumbrances, and (4) Deeds Pending Registration. 'Valuation Details' is not one of the sections.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第7段，每份土地登記冊分為四個部分：(1) 物業詳情、(2) 業主詳情、(3) 產權負擔，及(4) 待註冊契約。「估值詳情」並非其中之一。

question_en:
Which of the following information can be found in the Property Particulars section of a land register?

(I) The address of the property
(II) The lot number
(III) The term of the government lease
(IV) The name of the current owner
(V) The government rent payable
question_cn:
以下哪些資料可在土地登記冊的「物業詳情」部分找到？

(I) 物業地址
(II) 地段編號
(III) 政府租契年期
(IV) 現任業主姓名
(V) 應繳地租
explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 10, the Property Particulars section provides information on: the address, lot number, share of the lot, type of government lease, term of the lease, commencement date, and government rent and premium payable. The name of the current owner appears in the Owner Particulars section, not Property Particulars.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第10段，「物業詳情」部分提供以下資料：地址、地段編號、地段份數、政府租契類型、租契年期、開始日期，以及應繳地租及地價。現任業主姓名載於「業主詳情」部分，而非「物業詳情」部分。

question_en: New Territories leases granted for 99 years from 1 July 1898 were originally due to expire on 27 June 1997. What happened to these leases?
question_cn: 新界租約原為由1898年7月1日起計99年，原定於1997年6月27日届滿。這些租約的結果如何？

options_en.A: They expired and had to be renegotiated
options_en.B: They were automatically extended to 30 June 2047 by the New Territories Leases (Extension) Ordinance without additional premium but subject to 3% annual rent
options_en.C: They were extended for 50 years at full market premium
options_en.E: They were terminated and the land reverted to the Government

options_cn.B: 根據《新界土地契約（續期）條例》自動延期至2047年6月30日，無須繳付額外地價，但須繳付3%年租
options_cn.C: 以全額市值地價延期50年

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 14, all NT leases originally due to expire on 27 June 1997 have been automatically extended to 30 June 2047 by the New Territories Leases (Extension) Ordinance, without payment of an additional premium but subject to payment of annual rent equal to 3% of the rateable value of the land.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第14段，所有原定於1997年6月27日届滿的新界租約已根據《新界土地契約（續期）條例》自動延期至2047年6月30日，無須繳付額外地價，但須繳付相等於土地應課差餉租值3%的年租。

question_en: For non-renewable leases that had not expired by 30 June 1997, which of the following statements about extension is CORRECT?
question_cn: 對於在1997年6月30日前尚未届滿的不可續期租約，以下哪項關於延期的陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: Lessees have an automatic right to extension for 50 years
options_en.B: Extension is wholly at the discretion of the Government and may be refused
options_en.C: Extension requires payment of a full market premium
options_en.D: Extension can only be for 25 years
options_en.E: Extension is automatic upon payment of annual rent

options_cn.A: 承租人有自動延期50年的權利
options_cn.B: 延期完全由政府酌情決定，並可被拒絕
options_cn.C: 延期須繳付全額市值地價

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 12, lessees of non-renewable leases may apply for extension for 50 years. No additional premium is payable, but annual rent of 3% of rateable value applies. Critically, there is no automatic right to this extension -- it is wholly at the discretion of the Government, which may refuse if the land is needed for a public purpose or is no longer used for its original purpose.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第12段，不可續期租約的承租人可申請延期50年。無須繳付額外地價，但須繳付相等於應課差餉租值3%的年租。關鍵是，這項延期並非自動的權利——完全由政府酌情決定，如果土地需用作公共用途或不再用於原來用途，政府可予拒絕。

question_en: Mr. Lee and Mr. Ho own a property as joint tenants. Mr. Lee dies. What happens to the property?
question_cn: 李先生和何先生以聯權共有方式擁有一項物業。李先生去世後，物業的情況如何？

options_en.A: Mr. Lee's share passes to his heirs according to his will
options_en.B: Mr. Lee's share is divided equally among all surviving relatives
options_en.C: The property remains vested in Mr. Ho by virtue of the doctrine of survivorship
options_en.D: The property must be sold and proceeds divided
options_en.E: Mr. Lee's share passes to the Government

options_cn.A: 李先生的份額根據其遺囑轉移給繼承人
options_cn.B: 李先生的份額平均分配給所有在世親屬
options_cn.C: 物業根據生存者取得權的原則，繼續歸何先生所有
options_cn.D: 物業必須出售並平分所得款項
options_cn.E: 李先生的份額歸政府所有

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 25, in a joint tenancy, on the death of a co-owner, the property remains vested in the survivors by virtue of the doctrine of survivorship. The deceased joint tenant does not own a separate share that can pass by will or intestacy.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第25段，在聯權共有的情況下，當一名共有人去世時，物業根據生存者取得權的原則繼續歸在世的共有人所有。已故的聯權共有人並不擁有可透過遺囑或無遺囑繼承法轉移的獨立份額。

question_en:
Which of the following correctly distinguishes joint tenancy from tenancy in common?

(I) In joint tenancy, there is a right of survivorship; in tenancy in common, there is no right of survivorship
(II) In tenancy in common, each owner owns a distinct but undivided share
(III) In joint tenancy, each owner can sell their individual share without consent of others
(IV) All documents must be signed by all owners in both types
question_cn:
以下哪項正確區分聯權共有與分權共有？

(I) 聯權共有有生存者取得權；分權共有沒有生存者取得權
(II) 分權共有中，每名業主擁有獨立但不可分割的份額
(III) 聯權共有中，每名業主可在未經其他業主同意下出售其個人份額
(IV) 兩種共有方式中，所有文件均須由所有業主簽署
explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 25, in joint tenancy there is survivorship but no distinct share, while in tenancy in common each owner owns a distinct undivided share with no survivorship. In both types, all documents affecting the property should be signed by all owners. Statement (III) is incorrect -- under joint tenancy a co-owner does not own a distinct share that can be independently sold.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第25段，聯權共有中有生存者取得權但沒有獨立份額，而分權共有中每名業主擁有獨立但不可分割的份額且沒有生存者取得權。兩種共有方式中，所有影響物業的文件均應由所有業主簽署。陳述(III)不正確——在聯權共有下，共有人並不擁有可獨立出售的獨立份額。

question_en:
Joint tenants can sever the joint tenancy by:

(I) A notice served by one joint tenant on the other joint tenants
(II) An instrument signed by all joint tenants
(III) Application to the court under the Partition Ordinance
(IV) Verbal agreement between joint tenants
question_cn:
聯權共有人可透過以下方式終止聯權共有：

(I) 一名聯權共有人向其他聯權共有人送達通知
(II) 所有聯權共有人簽署的文書
(III) 根據《分割條例》向法庭申請
(IV) 聯權共有人之間的口頭協議
explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 25, joint tenants can end the co-ownership through: (1) application to the court under the Partition Ordinance if unable to settle the matter themselves, (2) severance by a notice served by one joint tenant on the others, or (3) an instrument signed by all of them. Verbal agreement is not listed as a method.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第25段，聯權共有人可透過以下方式終止共有：(1) 如雙方未能自行解決，根據《分割條例》向法庭申請；(2) 一名聯權共有人向其他聯權共有人送達通知以作分割；或(3) 所有聯權共有人簽署的文書。口頭協議並未列為分割方式之一。

question_en: A document appears in the 'Deeds Pending Registration' section of a land register. What does this indicate?
question_cn: 某文件出現在土地登記冊的「待註冊契約」部分。這表示甚麼？

options_en.A: The document has been fully registered
options_en.B: The document has been rejected by the Land Registry
options_en.C: Registration has been withheld, stopped, or is in process due to time, defect, or other reason
options_en.D: The document is waiting for the owner's approval
options_en.E: The document relates to a future transaction

options_cn.B: 該文件已被土地註冊處拒絕
options_cn.C: 註冊已被暫緩、停止或正在處理中，原因可能是時間、缺陷或其他原因
options_cn.D: 該文件正等待業主批准
options_cn.E: 該文件涉及未來的交易

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 24, if a document appears in the Deeds Pending Registration section, it means registration has been 'withheld' or 'stopped' or is 'in the process of registration' and has not been completed due to time, defect, or other reason (e.g., typing errors on the memorial or lack of evidence of stamp duty payment). A licensee should advise the client to seek legal advice.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第24段，如果某文件出現在「待註冊契約」部分，表示註冊已被「暫緩」或「停止」或「正在處理中」，因時間、缺陷或其他原因而未完成（例如摘要上的打字錯誤或缺乏繳付印花稅的證據）。持牌人應建議客戶尋求法律意見。

question_en:
An occupation permit found in the Incumbrances section of a land register provides information on:

(I) The user of units in the building when it was erected
(II) The age of the property
(III) The total number of units on a floor
(IV) The current market value of the property
question_cn:
載於土地登記冊「產權負擔」部分的入伙紙提供以下資料：

(I) 建築物落成時各單位的用途
(II) 物業的樓齡
(III) 每層的單位總數
(IV) 物業的目前市值
explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 39, the occupation permit is issued by the BA under the BO and specifies the user of units when the building was erected. From it, one can ascertain the age and user of a property. It also states the total number of units on a floor. It does NOT provide current market value.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第39段，入伙紙由建築事務監督根據《建築物條例》發出，載明建築物落成時各單位的用途。從中可以確定物業的樓齡和用途。入伙紙亦載有每層的單位總數。但不提供目前市值。

question_en: Under Section 33 of the Buildings Ordinance, if the Building Authority carries out works on behalf of a defaulting owner and registers a memorial of the certified cost, the charge on the property:
question_cn: 根據《建築物條例》Section 33，如建築事務監督代違責業主進行工程並將經核證費用的摘要註冊，該物業上的押記：

options_en.A: Ranks after any existing bank mortgage
options_en.B: Has no priority and is treated as an unsecured debt
options_en.C: Constitutes a first charge on the property taking priority over any bank charge
options_en.D: Only takes effect after the owner is given 90 days to pay
options_en.E: Can be removed by the owner without payment

options_cn.A: 排在任何現有銀行按揭之後
options_cn.B: 沒有優先權，被視為無抵押債務
options_cn.C: 構成物業的第一押記，優先於任何銀行押記
options_cn.D: 只在業主獲90天付款期限後才生效
options_cn.E: 業主可在不付款的情況下將其撤銷

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 39, under Section 33 of the BO, the BA may certify costs due from an owner for works carried out by the BA and register a memorial. Upon registration, the cost constitutes a first charge on the property, which takes priority over any charge created by a bank or other chargee.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第39段，《建築物條例》Section 33規定，建築事務監督可將業主就建築事務監督進行工程所欠費用加以核證並註冊摘要。註冊後，該費用構成物業的第一押記，優先於銀行或其他承押人設立的任何押記。

question_en: A building order registered under Section 24 of the Buildings Ordinance has not been followed by a letter of compliance. A licensee should advise the purchaser to:
question_cn: 根據《建築物條例》Section 24註冊的建築令之後並未附有合規信。持牌人應建議買方：

options_en.A: Proceed with the purchase as the order is likely expired
options_en.B: Ignore the order as it only affects common areas
options_en.C: Seek legal and possibly professional advice before entering into a PASP
options_en.D: Negotiate a 5% discount on the purchase price
options_en.E: Register a complaint with the Buildings Department

options_cn.A: 繼續購買，因為該命令很可能已過期
options_cn.B: 忽略該命令，因為它只影響公用部分
options_cn.C: 在簽署臨時買賣合約前尋求法律及可能的專業意見

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 39, if a letter of compliance or satisfaction letter does not appear after a building order in the Incumbrances section, the order is apparently still outstanding. Licensees should check with the owner and the purchaser should be advised to seek legal and, if necessary, other professional advice (e.g., from an architect) before entering into a PASP.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第39段，如在「產權負擔」部分的建築令之後並未出現合規信或解除信，該命令明顯仍然未被遵從。持牌人應向業主查詢，並應建議買方在簽署臨時買賣合約前尋求法律意見，如有需要，亦應尋求其他專業意見（例如建築師的意見）。

question_en: If a bankruptcy order is made against the owner of a property, a purchaser should purchase the property from:
question_cn: 如物業業主被頒布破產令，買方應向誰購買該物業？

options_en.B: The Official Receiver as trustee of the bankrupt's estate

options_cn.B: 向作為破產人產業受託人的破產管理署署長購買
options_cn.C: 向破產業主的律師購買
options_cn.D: 向破產人的任何債權人購買

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 39, once a bankruptcy order is made, the bankrupt's property will be vested in the Official Receiver as the trustee of the estate of the bankrupt. A purchaser should purchase the property from the Official Receiver and not from the bankrupt.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第39段，一旦頒布破產令，破產人的財產將歸破產管理署署長作為破產人產業的受託人管有。買方應向破產管理署署長而非破產人購買物業。

question_en: According to Practice Circular No. 13-01(CR), when should a licensee conduct a historical and current land search rather than just a current search?
question_cn: 根據執業通告第13-01(CR)號，持牌人應在何時進行歷史及現時查冊而非只進行現時查冊？

options_en.A: Only when the property is over 50 years old
options_en.B: When a current search reveals the vendor has been the registered owner for less than five years
options_en.C: Only when dealing with commercial properties
options_en.D: When the purchase price exceeds $10 million
options_en.E: Only when the property is in the New Territories

options_cn.A: 只在物業超過50年樓齡時
options_cn.B: 當現時查冊顯示賣方成為登記業主不足五年

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 33, before arranging for a client to enter into an SPA, if a current land search reveals that the vendor has been the current registered owner for less than five years from the date of the search, a licensee should further conduct a historical and current search of the property (Practice Circular No. 13-01(CR)).
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第33段，在安排客戶簽署買賣合約前，如現時土地查冊顯示賣方由查冊日期起計成為現時登記業主不足五年，持牌人應進一步就該物業進行歷史及現時查冊（執業通告第13-01(CR)號）。

question_en:
Land search services under the Integrated Registration Information System (IRIS) can be accessed via:

(I) The Customer Centre at Queensway Government Offices
(II) New Territories Search Offices
(III) The internet
(IV) Any District Office
question_cn:
綜合註冊資訊系統（IRIS）下的土地查冊服務可透過以下途徑使用：

(I) 金鐘政府合署的客戶服務中心
(II) 新界查冊辦事處
(III) 互聯網
(IV) 任何民政事務處
explanation_en: Per Part 4 paras 35-36, IRIS provides land search services through three channels: the Customer Centre at 19/F Queensway Government Offices, the New Territories Search Offices in Tsuen Wan, Yuen Long and Tai Po, and via the internet. District Offices are not listed as providing this service.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第35至36段，IRIS透過三個途徑提供土地查冊服務：金鐘政府合署19樓的客戶服務中心、位於荃灣、元朗及大埔的新界查冊辦事處，以及互聯網。民政事務處並非提供此服務的途徑。

question_en: Regarding the 'Date of Instrument' and 'Date of Registration' shown on a land register, which statement is CORRECT?
question_cn: 關於土地登記冊上顯示的「文書日期」和「註冊日期」，以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: They always refer to the same date
options_en.B: The Date of Instrument is the date of execution or issuance, while the Date of Registration is when the instrument is lodged for registration
options_en.C: The Date of Registration is always earlier than the Date of Instrument
options_en.D: The Date of Instrument refers to when the memorial is prepared
options_en.E: Both dates are set by the Land Registrar

options_cn.B: 「文書日期」是簽立或發出的日期，而「註冊日期」是文書送交註冊的日期
options_cn.C: 「註冊日期」永遠早於「文書日期」
options_cn.D: 「文書日期」是指摘要擬備的日期
options_cn.E: 兩個日期均由土地註冊處處長設定

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 21, the date of an instrument (its date of execution or issuance) is set out in the 'Date of Instrument' column. This is NOT the same as the 'Date of Registration', which is the date on which the instrument is lodged for registration at the Land Registry.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第21段，文書日期（即其簽立或發出的日期）載於「文書日期」一欄。這與「註冊日期」並不相同，後者是文書送交土地註冊處註冊的日期。

question_en: Which of the following is CORRECT about a Deed of Mutual Covenant (DMC)?
question_cn: 關於公契（大廈公契），以下哪項是正確的？

options_en.A: It is a contract between the Government and the land owner
options_en.B: It is a contract entered into by the developer, the manager, and the first purchaser, providing for the management of the building
options_en.C: It is a government-issued permit for building construction
options_en.D: It is an agreement between all unit owners in a building
options_en.E: It is a mortgage document between the developer and the bank

options_cn.A: 是政府與土地業權人之間的合約
options_cn.B: 是由發展商、管理人及首名購買人訂立的合約，規管大廈的管理事宜
options_cn.C: 是政府發出的建築許可證
options_cn.D: 是大廈內所有業主之間的協議
options_cn.E: 是發展商與銀行之間的按揭文件

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 39, the DMC is a contract entered into by the developer of the building, the manager appointed by the developer, and the first person to purchase a unit in the development. It provides for the management of the building and maintenance of common parts, and sets out the rights and obligations of the co-owners and the duties and powers of the manager.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第39段，公契是由大廈發展商、發展商委任的管理人及首名購買發展項目內單位的人士所訂立的合約。公契規管大廈的管理及公用部分的保養維修事宜，並訂明共有人的權利和義務以及管理人的職責和權力。

question_en: A 'lis pendens' registered against a property indicates that:
question_cn: 就某物業註冊的「待決訴訟」表示：

options_en.B: The property is subject to a mortgage
options_en.C: Someone is taking court action to prove they have an interest in the land

options_cn.C: 有人正採取法律行動以證明其對該土地擁有權益

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 3, a lis pendens is a notice indicating that someone is taking action to prove he has an interest in the land. Under Section 5A of the LRO, lis pendens take priority from the day following the date of registration. It would be unwise to have dealings with the property until the litigation is completed.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第3段，待決訴訟是表示有人正採取法律行動以證明其對該土地擁有權益的通知。根據《土地註冊條例》Section 5A，待決訴訟的優先權由註冊日期翌日起計算。在訴訟完結前處置該物業是不明智的。

question_en: A property transferred by deed of gift may be set aside by the trustee in bankruptcy if a bankruptcy order is made against the donor within what period of making the gift?
question_cn: 以送贈契方式轉讓的物業，如送贈人在送贈後多長時間內被頒布破產令，破產受託人可將該轉讓作廢？
explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 31, a deed of gift may be set aside by the trustee in bankruptcy under the Bankruptcy Ordinance in cases where a bankruptcy order has been made against the donor within five years of making the gift.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第31段，如送贈人在送贈後五年內被頒布破產令，破產受託人可根據《破產條例》將送贈契作廢。

question_en: New leases granted after 27 May 1985 (when the Sino-British Joint Declaration came into force) have usually been for a term of:
question_cn: 1985年5月27日（《中英聯合聲明》生效日）後批出的新租約，年期通常為：

options_en.A: 25 years from the date of grant
options_en.B: 50 years from the date of grant
options_en.C: 75 years from the date of grant
options_en.D: 99 years from the date of grant
options_en.E: 999 years from the date of grant

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 16, new leases granted after 27 May 1985 have usually been for a term of 50 years from the date of the grant. This has meant that leases granted after 30 June 1997 may extend beyond 30 June 2047.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第16段，1985年5月27日後批出的新租約年期通常為由批出日期起計50年。這意味着1997年6月30日後批出的租約可延伸至2047年6月30日以後。

question_en: The Owner Particulars section of a land register provides information on all of the following EXCEPT:
question_cn: 土地登記冊的「業主詳情」部分提供以下所有資料，除了：

options_en.B: Mode of ownership (joint tenants or tenants in common)
options_en.C: Memorial number of the acquisition instrument
options_en.E: The owner's Hong Kong Identity Card number

options_cn.B: 擁有權方式（聯權共有人或分權共有人）
options_cn.C: 取得物業文書的摘要編號
options_cn.E: 業主的香港身份證號碼

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 20, the Owner Particulars section provides: names of registered owners, mode of ownership, memorial number, date of registration of the acquisition instrument, and the consideration stated. The owner's HKID number is NOT disclosed in the land register.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第20段，「業主詳情」部分提供：登記業主姓名、擁有權方式、摘要編號、取得物業文書的註冊日期，以及所載的代價。業主的香港身份證號碼不會在土地登記冊中披露。

question_en: Which type of lease does NOT need to be registered to maintain priority against a subsequent purchaser?
question_cn: 哪種租約無須註冊即可對其後的買方維持優先權？

options_en.B: A bona fide lease at rack rent for a term not exceeding three years
options_en.C: A lease with an option to purchase

options_cn.B: 按市值租金訂立、年期不超過三年的真正租約
options_cn.C: 附有購買選擇權的租約

explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 5 and Part 3 para 43, bona fide leases at rack rent for a term not exceeding three years need not be registered and will not lose priority. However, if such a tenancy contains an option to renew or purchase, the option itself will only have priority if registered.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第5段及第三部分第43段，按市值租金訂立、年期不超過三年的真正租約無須註冊，亦不會喪失優先權。但如該租約載有續約或購買的選擇權，該選擇權本身只有在註冊後才享有優先權。

question_en:
When the vendor is a limited company, a licensee should conduct a company search to ascertain:

(I) The company's registered office
(II) Names of directors
(III) Whether a receiver or liquidator has been appointed
(IV) Whether the company is still validly registered
(V) The personal bank accounts of directors
question_cn:
當賣方為有限公司時，持牌人應進行公司查冊以確定：

(I) 公司的註冊辦事處
(II) 董事姓名
(III) 是否已委任接管人或清盤人
(IV) 公司是否仍然有效註冊
(V) 董事的個人銀行賬戶
explanation_en: Per Part 4 para 42, when the vendor is a limited company, a company search should ascertain: registered office, names of directors, whether a receiver or liquidator has been appointed, and whether the company is still validly registered or has been wound up, struck off, or de-registered. Personal bank accounts of directors are not obtainable from a company search.
explanation_cn: 根據第四部分第42段，當賣方為有限公司時，公司查冊應確定：註冊辦事處、董事姓名、是否已委任接管人或清盤人，以及公司是否仍然有效註冊或已被清盤、除名或撤銷註冊。董事的個人銀行賬戶不能從公司查冊中獲取。

question_en:
Which of the following statements about the development of real estate agency practice in Hong Kong is/are correct?

(i) In the 1950s and 1960s, most estate agents operated from restaurants
(ii) Mei Foo Sun Chuen in 1966 was the first major housing estate that changed the estate agency landscape
(iii) The commission system for staff was introduced in the early 1990s
(iv) The Estate Agents Ordinance was enacted in 1997
question_cn:
關於香港地產代理業務發展，以下哪項陳述是正確的？

(i) 在1950至60年代，大多數地產代理在酒樓經營業務
(ii) 1966年的美孚新邨是首個改變地產代理業面貌的大型屋苑
(iii) 員工佣金制度在1990年代初引入
(iv) 《地產代理條例》於1997年制定
explanation_en: Statements (i), (ii) and (iv) are correct. In the 1950s-60s, agents met in restaurants to exchange information. Mei Foo Sun Chuen in 1966 was the start of multi-storey residential buildings in large estates. The EAO was enacted in 1997. However, statement (iii) is incorrect — the commission system was introduced in the early 1980s, not 1990s.
explanation_cn: 陳述(i)、(ii)及(iv)正確。在1950至60年代，代理在酒樓會面交換資訊。1966年的美孚新邨是大型屋苑多層住宅大廈的開端。《地產代理條例》於1997年制定。但陳述(iii)不正確——佣金制度在1980年代初引入，而非1990年代。

question_en: Which government department is responsible for collecting government rent and rates, and provides property information through its online system?
question_cn: 哪個政府部門負責徵收地租及差餉，並透過其網上系統提供物業資料？
explanation_en: The Rating and Valuation Department is responsible for collecting government rent and rates. Property information such as saleable area, user and completion year can be obtained from this department through the Property Information Online system.
explanation_cn: 差餉物業估價署負責徵收地租及差餉。物業資料如實用面積、用途及落成年份可透過「物業資訊網」系統從該部門取得。

question_en: Which of the following is NOT a role typically performed by a licensed estate agent?
question_cn: 以下哪項不是持牌地產代理通常履行的職能？

options_en.A: Marketing properties for sale or lease
options_en.C: Providing legal advice on conveyancing procedures
options_en.E: Negotiating terms of sale between vendor and purchaser

options_cn.A: 推銷出售或出租的物業
options_cn.C: 就物業轉易程序提供法律意見
options_cn.E: 在賣方與買方之間磋商交易條款

explanation_en: Providing legal advice on conveyancing is the role of solicitors, not estate agents. Estate agents may assist with introductions to lawyers but should not provide legal advice themselves. The other options are all typical roles of estate agents.
explanation_cn: 就物業轉易提供法律意見是律師的職能，而非地產代理。地產代理可協助介紹律師，但不應自行提供法律意見。其他選項均為地產代理的典型職能。

question_en: The special stamp duty, buyer's stamp duty, and double stamp duty introduced by the Hong Kong Government were intended to:
question_cn: 香港政府推出的額外印花稅、買家印花稅及雙倍印花稅旨在：

options_en.B: Manage demand and cool down the overheated property market
options_en.D: Reduce the number of licensed estate agents
options_en.E: Promote the sale of uncompleted properties

options_cn.B: 管理需求並為過熱的物業市場降温
options_cn.D: 減少持牌地產代理的數目
options_cn.E: 推廣未落成物業的銷售

explanation_en: The special stamp duty (2010), buyer's stamp duty, and double stamp duty (2013) were property market measures intended to manage demand and cool down the overheated property market, particularly to suppress speculation activities.
explanation_cn: 額外印花稅（2010年）、買家印花稅及雙倍印花稅（2013年）是物業市場調控措施，旨在管理需求並為過熱的物業市場降温，特別是壓抑炒賣活動。

question_en:
A land search from the Land Registry will show which of the following?

(i) Ownership of the land
(ii) Registered encumbrances
(iii) Leases for a term in excess of three years
(iv) Current market value of the property
question_cn:
從土地註冊處進行的土地查冊會顯示以下哪些資料？

(i) 土地的擁有權
(ii) 已註冊的產權負擔
(iii) 年期超過三年的租約
(iv) 物業的目前市值
explanation_en: A land registry search shows ownership, registered encumbrances, and dealings such as leases for a term in excess of three years. It does NOT show the current market value of the property — that would require a separate valuation.
explanation_cn: 土地查冊會顯示擁有權、已註冊的產權負擔，以及年期超過三年的租約等交易。但不會顯示物業的目前市值——需要另行進行估值。

question_en: According to the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following is NOT a principal function of the Estate Agents Authority?
question_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，以下哪項不是地產代理監管局的主要職能？

options_en.A: To regulate and control the practice of estate agents and salespersons
options_en.B: To promote integrity and competence amongst estate agents
options_en.C: To set property prices in the market
options_en.D: To liaise with educational institutions for training courses
options_en.E: To maintain or enhance the status of estate agents and salespersons

options_cn.A: 規管及控制地產代理和營業員的執業
options_cn.B: 提升地產代理的誠信及能力
options_cn.D: 與教育機構聯絡以提供培訓課程
options_cn.E: 維持或提升地產代理和營業員的地位

explanation_en: Setting property prices is not a function of the EAA. Under the EAO, the principal functions include regulating practice, promoting integrity and competence, maintaining/enhancing status, and liaising with educational institutions for training.
explanation_cn: 設定物業價格並非地產代理監管局的職能。根據《地產代理條例》，監管局的主要職能包括規管執業、提升誠信及能力、維持或提升地位，以及與教育機構聯絡以提供培訓。

question_en: Regarding the membership of the Estate Agents Authority, which of the following statements is correct?
question_cn: 關於地產代理監管局的成員，以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: The Chairman must be an individual who does estate agency work
options_en.B: There may be not more than 18 Ordinary Members
options_en.C: All Ordinary Members must be from the estate agency trade
options_en.D: Members are appointed by the Secretary for Housing
options_en.E: The Vice-Chairman must hold an estate agent's licence

options_cn.A: 主席必須為從事地產代理工作的人士
options_cn.C: 所有普通成員必須來自地產代理業
options_cn.D: 成員由房屋局局長委任
options_cn.E: 副主席必須持有地產代理牌照

explanation_en: Under the EAO, there may be not more than 18 Ordinary Members. The Chairman and Vice-Chairman may NOT be individuals who do estate agency work. Members are appointed by the Chief Executive of Hong Kong, not the Secretary for Housing. Ordinary Members come from various categories, not all from the trade.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，普通成員不得超過18名。主席及副主席不得為從事地產代理工作的人士。成員由香港行政長官委任，而非房屋局局長。普通成員來自不同界別，並非全部來自地產代理業。

question_en:
Under Section 30(1) of the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following disciplinary powers may be exercised by the Authority?

(i) Admonish or reprimand the licensee
(ii) Suspend the licence for up to two years
(iii) Impose a fine not exceeding $500,000
(iv) Revoke the licence
(v) Attach specified conditions to the licence
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》Section 30(1)，監管局可行使以下哪些紀律處分權力？

(i) 譴責或訓誡持牌人
(ii) 暫時吊銷牌照，最長兩年
(iii) 處以不超過$500,000的罰款
(iv) 撤銷牌照
(v) 在牌照上附加指明的條件
explanation_en: Under Section 30(1), the Authority may: admonish/reprimand, attach conditions, vary conditions, suspend for up to 2 years, revoke licence, and impose a fine up to $300,000 (not $500,000). Statement (iii) is incorrect as the maximum fine is $300,000, not $500,000.
explanation_cn: 根據Section 30(1)，監管局可以：譴責或訓誡、附加條件、更改條件、暫時吊銷最長兩年、撤銷牌照，以及處以不超過$300,000（而非$500,000）的罰款。陳述(iii)不正確，因為最高罰款為$300,000，而非$500,000。

question_en:
When the Authority conducts an investigation under Section 28, a licensee under investigation is required to:

(i) Produce documents specified by the investigator
(ii) Give explanations or further particulars as specified
(iii) Give all assistance as he can reasonably give
(iv) Allow the investigator to search his home at any time
question_cn:
當監管局根據Section 28進行調查時，被調查的持牌人須：

(i) 出示調查人員指明的文件
(ii) 提供指明的解釋或進一步詳情
(iii) 盡力給予合理的協助
(iv) 允許調查人員隨時搜查其住所
explanation_en: Under Section 28, the licensee must: produce documents, give explanations/further particulars, and give all reasonable assistance. There is no requirement to allow the investigator to search the licensee's home at any time — that would be unreasonable.
explanation_cn: 根據Section 28，持牌人須：出示文件、提供解釋或進一步詳情，以及盡力給予合理的協助。並無要求允許調查人員隨時搜查持牌人的住所——這是不合理的。

question_en: A licensed estate agent carrying on estate agency business at one place under two different business names is required to apply for how many Statement(s) of Particulars of Business (SPOB)?
question_cn: 一名持牌地產代理在同一地點以兩個不同的商號經營地產代理業務，須申請多少份營業詳情說明書（SPOB）？

options_en.E: It depends on the number of salespersons employed

options_cn.E: 視乎所僱用的營業員人數而定

explanation_en: Under Section 10(1) of the Licensing Regulation, if a licensed estate agent has more than one place of business and/or operates under more than one name, separate SPOBs are required. An agent at one place with two business names needs two SPOBs.
explanation_cn: 根據《發牌規例》Section 10(1)，如持牌地產代理有多於一個營業地點及/或以多於一個商號經營，須分別申請營業詳情說明書。在同一地點以兩個商號經營的代理須申請兩份營業詳情說明書。

question_en: According to Section 2 of the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the following statements about the definitions of 'estate agent' and 'salesperson' is correct?
question_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》Section 2，關於「地產代理」和「營業員」的定義，以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: Both an estate agent and a salesperson may be a limited company
options_en.B: A salesperson does estate agency work in the course of his employment by an estate agent
options_en.C: An estate agent can only be an individual, not a company
options_en.D: A salesperson may carry on estate agency business independently
options_en.E: There is no legal distinction between an estate agent and a salesperson

options_cn.A: 地產代理和營業員均可以是有限公司
options_cn.B: 營業員在受僱於地產代理的過程中從事地產代理工作
options_cn.C: 地產代理只能是個人，不能是公司
options_cn.D: 營業員可以獨立經營地產代理業務
options_cn.E: 地產代理和營業員之間在法律上沒有區別

explanation_en: Under Section 2, a salesperson does estate agency work in the course of his employment by, or as a director of, an estate agent. An estate agent may be a company or individual (a 'person' includes bodies corporate). A salesperson is always an individual (Section 21(1)) and cannot carry on business independently.
explanation_cn: 根據Section 2，營業員在受僱於地產代理或作為地產代理的董事的過程中從事地產代理工作。地產代理可以是公司或個人（「人」包括法人團體）。營業員必須為個人（Section 21(1)），不能獨立經營業務。

question_en:
Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, 'estate agency work' does NOT include work which relates solely to:

(i) A survey
(ii) A valuation
(iii) A disposition by way of auction or tender
(iv) Property management
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》，「地產代理工作」不包括純粹涉及以下哪些事項的工作？

(i) 測量
(ii) 估值
(iii) 以拍賣或招標方式處置
(iv) 物業管理
explanation_en: Under Section 2(3) of the EAO, references to 'estate agency work' are not to be construed as including work relating solely to a survey, a valuation, or a disposition by way of auction or tender. Property management is not specifically excluded.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》Section 2(3)，凡提述「地產代理工作」，不得解釋為包括純粹涉及測量、估值或以拍賣或招標方式處置的工作。物業管理並非被明確排除在外。

question_en:
Which of the following can a holder of a salesperson's licence do?

(i) Carry on estate agency business as a sole proprietor
(ii) Work as a salesperson for a licensed estate agent
(iii) Be appointed as the manager for effective and separate control of an estate agency office
(iv) Do estate agency work as a director of an estate agent
question_cn:
持有營業員牌照的人可以做以下哪些事項？

(i) 以獨資經營者身分經營地產代理業務
(ii) 為持牌地產代理擔任營業員
(iii) 被委任為地產代理辦事處的有效及獨立控制經理
(iv) 作為地產代理的董事從事地產代理工作
explanation_en: A salesperson's licence holder can work as a salesperson for a licensed estate agent or as a director doing estate agency work. However, they cannot carry on estate agency business as a sole proprietor (requires estate agent's licence) and cannot be appointed as manager under Section 38 (requires estate agent's licence).
explanation_cn: 持有營業員牌照的人可以為持牌地產代理擔任營業員或作為董事從事地產代理工作。但不能以獨資經營者身分經營地產代理業務（須持有地產代理牌照），亦不能根據Section 38被委任為經理（須持有地產代理牌照）。

question_en:
Under Section 14 of the Licensing Regulation, which of the following must be stated in advertisements (other than pamphlets and brochures) issued by a licensed estate agent?

(i) The number of his licence or the relevant SPOB
(ii) The business name as stated in the relevant SPOB
(iii) The place of business as stated in the relevant SPOB
question_cn:
根據《發牌規例》Section 14，持牌地產代理發出的廣告（小冊子及宣傳單張除外）須載有以下哪些資料？

(i) 其牌照或有關營業詳情說明書的編號
(ii) 有關營業詳情說明書所載的商號名稱
(iii) 有關營業詳情說明書所載的營業地點
explanation_en: Under Section 14 of the Licensing Regulation, advertisements (pamphlets and brochures excepted) must state: the licence/SPOB number AND the business name as stated in the SPOB. The place of business is required on letters, accounts, receipts, pamphlets and brochures — but NOT on other advertisements.
explanation_cn: 根據《發牌規例》Section 14，廣告（小冊子及宣傳單張除外）須載有：牌照/營業詳情說明書編號及營業詳情說明書所載的商號名稱。營業地點須載於信件、賬單、收據、小冊子及宣傳單張上，但其他廣告則無此要求。

question_en: The licensing regime for the estate agency trade in Hong Kong came into effect on:
question_cn: 香港地產代理業的發牌制度於何時生效？
explanation_en: The licensing regime came into effect on 1 January 1999, requiring any person who carries on estate agency work in Hong Kong to hold a licence. The EAO itself was enacted in 1997, but the licensing provisions took effect from 1 January 1999.
explanation_cn: 發牌制度於1999年1月1日生效，規定任何在香港從事地產代理工作的人士均須持有牌照。《地產代理條例》本身於1997年制定，但發牌條文自1999年1月1日起生效。

question_en:
A person holding an estate agent's licence may perform estate agency work in which of the following capacities?

(i) As a sole proprietor
(ii) As a member of a partnership
(iii) As a director of a company holding an estate agent's licence
(iv) As a salesperson of another licensed estate agent
question_cn:
持有地產代理牌照的人可以以下哪些身分從事地產代理工作？

(i) 獨資經營者
(ii) 合夥人
(iii) 持有地產代理牌照的公司的董事
(iv) 另一持牌地產代理的營業員
explanation_en: A person holding an estate agent's licence may perform estate agency work without restriction in all four capacities: as a sole proprietor, a partnership member, a director of a licensed company, or even as a salesperson of another licensed estate agent.
explanation_cn: 持有地產代理牌照的人可以不受限制地以所有四種身分從事地產代理工作：獨資經營者、合夥人、持牌公司的董事，甚至另一持牌地產代理的營業員。

question_en: When dealing with a complaint against a licensee, the Authority may:
question_cn: 在處理對持牌人的投訴時，監管局可以：

options_en.A: Only deal with the matter itself
options_en.B: Only refer the matter to a disciplinary committee
options_en.C: Deal with the matter itself or refer it to a disciplinary committee
options_en.D: Refer it to the police for criminal investigation

options_cn.B: 只能將該事宜轉介紀律委員會
options_cn.C: 自行處理該事宜或將其轉介紀律委員會
options_cn.D: 將其轉介警方進行刑事調查

explanation_en: Under Sections 29(1) and 29(2), the Authority may deal with the matter itself OR refer the matter to a disciplinary committee. The Authority or the disciplinary committee may then conduct an inquiry as it thinks fit under Section 29(3).
explanation_cn: 根據Section 29(1)及29(2)，監管局可自行處理該事宜或將該事宜轉介紀律委員會。監管局或紀律委員會其後可根據Section 29(3)進行其認為適當的查訊。

question_en: A licensee facing disciplinary action may avoid the exercise of powers under Section 30 if the licensee shows that:
question_cn: 面臨紀律處分的持牌人如能證明以下哪項，可避免被行使Section 30下的權力？

options_en.A: The licensee was new to the trade
options_en.B: The licensee had taken all reasonable steps and exercised all due diligence to avoid the breach
options_en.C: The client did not suffer any financial loss
options_en.D: The licensee has since corrected the breach
options_en.E: The licensee has apologised to the complainant

options_cn.B: 該持牌人已採取一切合理步驟及盡一切應盡的努力以避免該違反
options_cn.C: 客戶沒有蒙受任何經濟損失
options_cn.D: 該持牌人其後已糾正該違反
options_cn.E: 該持牌人已向投訴人道歉

explanation_en: The disciplinary powers in Section 30 will not be exercised against a licensee if he shows that he had taken all reasonable steps and exercised all due diligence to avoid the non-compliance, contravention or occurrence of the matter in question.
explanation_cn: 如持牌人能證明其已採取一切合理步驟及盡一切應盡的努力，以避免有關的不遵從、違反或事情的發生，則Section 30的紀律處分權力將不會對其行使。

question_en:
At an inquiry conducted under Section 29, the Authority or disciplinary committee has the power to:

(i) Take evidence on oath
(ii) Summon any person to attend the inquiry
(iii) Award reasonable expenses to a witness
(iv) Impose imprisonment on the licensee
question_cn:
在根據Section 29進行的查訊中，監管局或紀律委員會有權：

(i) 取得宣誓證據
(ii) 傳召任何人出席查訊
(iii) 向證人支付合理費用
(iv) 對持牌人判處監禁
explanation_en: Under Section 34, the Authority or disciplinary committee may take evidence on oath, summon persons to attend and give evidence, and award reasonable expenses to witnesses. It cannot impose imprisonment — that is a criminal sanction beyond the Authority's powers.
explanation_cn: 根據Section 34，監管局或紀律委員會可取得宣誓證據、傳召人士出席作供，以及向證人支付合理費用。監管局不能判處監禁——這是超出監管局權力範圍的刑事制裁。

question_en: Under Section 30(1) of the EAO, the maximum period for which the Authority may suspend a licence is:
question_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》Section 30(1)，監管局暫時吊銷牌照的最長期限為：
explanation_en: Under Section 30(1), the Authority may suspend a licence for a specified period not exceeding two years.
explanation_cn: 根據Section 30(1)，監管局可暫時吊銷牌照，為期不超過兩年。

question_en: A government grant of land in Hong Kong is now usually for a term of:
question_cn: 現時香港的政府土地批約年期通常為：
explanation_en: A government grant is now usually for a term of 50 years from the date of the document.
explanation_cn: 現時政府土地批約年期通常為由文件日期起計50年。

question_en: The government rent payable on land is usually an annual rent of an amount equal to what percentage of the rateable value?
question_cn: 土地的地租通常為每年相等於應課差餉租值百分之幾的金額？
explanation_en: The government rent is usually an annual rent of an amount equal to 3% of the rateable value from time to time of the land.
explanation_cn: 地租通常為每年相等於該土地不時的應課差餉租值3%的金額。

question_en: Which type of government land grant conditions is used when a landowner exchanges existing land for another piece of land?
question_cn: 當地主以現有土地交換另一幅土地時，使用哪種政府土地批約條件？
explanation_en: Conditions of exchange are issued where the owner exchanges the land he currently owns for another piece of land.
explanation_cn: 交換條件適用於業主以其現有土地交換另一幅土地的情況。

question_en: The majority of government land in Hong Kong is sold by which method?
question_cn: 香港大部分政府土地以哪種方式出售？
explanation_en: At present, the majority of government land in Hong Kong is sold by auction. Tenders are used only where the development conditions are complex, or in cases of very specialised uses of land.
explanation_cn: 目前，香港大部分政府土地以拍賣方式出售。招標只在發展條件較為複雜或土地有非常特殊用途的情況下使用。

question_en: In the event of non-compliance with general and special conditions of a government lease, the Government has the right of re-entry. Is compensation payable for improvements on the land?
question_cn: 如不遵守政府租契的一般及特別條件，政府有權收回土地。就土地上的改善工程是否須支付賠償？

options_en.A: Yes, full market value compensation is payable
options_en.B: Yes, but only for structural improvements
options_en.C: No, no compensation is payable for any improvements on the land
options_en.D: Compensation is payable at the Government's discretion
options_en.E: Compensation is payable if the non-compliance was unintentional

options_cn.A: 須支付，按全額市值賠償
options_cn.B: 須支付，但僅限於結構性改善工程
options_cn.C: 無須就土地上的任何改善工程支付賠償
options_cn.D: 由政府酌情決定是否賠償
options_cn.E: 如不遵守屬非蓄意的，則須支付賠償

explanation_en: The Government has the right of re-entry in the event of non-compliance with the general and special conditions. No compensation is payable for any improvements on the land.
explanation_cn: 如不遵守一般及特別條件，政府有權收回土地。無須就土地上的任何改善工程支付賠償。

question_en: Which of the following correctly describes the difference between a lease and a licence?
question_cn: 以下哪項正確描述租約與特許之間的分別？

options_en.A: A lease gives exclusive possession while a licence gives non-exclusive right to occupy
options_en.B: A lease is always for a shorter term than a licence
options_en.C: A licence creates an interest in land while a lease does not
options_en.D: There is no legal difference between a lease and a licence
options_en.E: A licence requires registration while a lease does not

options_cn.A: 租約賦予獨有管有權，而特許賦予非獨有的佔用權利
options_cn.B: 租約的年期永遠短於特許
options_cn.C: 特許產生土地權益，而租約則不會
options_cn.D: 租約與特許在法律上沒有分別
options_cn.E: 特許須註冊，而租約則不須

explanation_en: A tenancy/lease creates an interest in land and gives exclusive possession, whereas a licence only gives a non-exclusive right to occupy and does not create an interest in land. A licensee has only a personal interest that can be revoked by the landowner at any time.
explanation_cn: 租約產生土地權益並賦予獨有管有權，而特許只賦予非獨有的佔用權利，不產生土地權益。特許持有人只有可由地主隨時撤銷的個人權益。

question_en: A lease exceeding how many years must be registered in the Land Registry to be protected against third parties?
question_cn: 超過多少年的租約必須在土地註冊處註冊，才能對第三方受到保障？
explanation_en: The rights of a lessee under a lease exceeding three years are protected against third parties if the lease has been registered. A tenancy not exceeding three years is protected even without registration, provided the tenancy is bona fide and the rent is at market rate.
explanation_cn: 超過三年的租約的承租人權利，如已註冊則受保障而不受第三方影響。不超過三年的租約即使未註冊亦受保障，但租約必須為真正的租約且租金為市值租金。

question_en: For a monthly periodic tenancy in Hong Kong, how much notice must the landlord give the tenant to quit?
question_cn: 就香港的按月周期性租賃而言，業主須給予租客多長的遷出通知期？
explanation_en: The notice period for a periodic tenancy is based on the period for payment of rent. The most common periodic tenancy in Hong Kong is a monthly tenancy, for which the landlord would need to give the tenant one month's notice to quit.
explanation_cn: 周期性租賃的通知期以繳付租金的周期為基準。香港最常見的周期性租賃為按月租賃，業主須給予租客一個月的遷出通知。

question_en: If a tenancy agreement contains an option to renew or purchase, what must the tenant do to ensure the option binds a third party who subsequently purchases the property?
question_cn: 如租約載有續約或購買的選擇權，租客須怎樣做才能確保該選擇權對其後購買物業的第三方具約束力？

options_en.A: Notify the third party in writing
options_en.B: Register the tenancy agreement in the Land Registry
options_en.E: Nothing — the option automatically binds all third parties

options_cn.B: 在土地註冊處註冊該租約
options_cn.E: 無須做任何事——選擇權自動對所有第三方具約束力

explanation_en: If the lease/tenancy agreement contains an option to renew or purchase, registration causes the option to bind a third party. If the agreement has not been registered before a sale, the new owner does not have to honour the option.
explanation_cn: 如租約載有續約或購買的選擇權，註冊可使該選擇權對第三方具約束力。如租約在出售前未經註冊，新業主無須履行該選擇權。

question_en: A fixed term tenancy comes to an end:
question_cn: 固定期限租約於何時届滿？

options_en.A: When the landlord gives notice to quit
options_en.B: At the end of the last day of the fixed period
options_en.C: When the tenant stops paying rent
options_en.D: Only when both parties agree to terminate
options_en.E: When the property is sold to a third party

options_cn.A: 當業主發出遷出通知時
options_cn.B: 在固定期限最後一天結束時
options_cn.C: 當租客停止繳付租金時
options_cn.E: 當物業出售予第三方時

explanation_en: A fixed term tenancy is a lease/tenancy for a fixed period of any length. It comes to an end at the end of the last day of that period. The tenant must then vacate the premises.
explanation_cn: 固定期限租約是指任何長度的固定期限的租約。該租約在固定期限最後一天結束時届滿。租客屆時須遷出物業。

question_en: An estate agency company may be vicariously liable for the wrongful acts of an employee if the acts were committed:
question_cn: 地產代理公司可就僱員的不當行為承擔轉承責任，如果該等行為是在以下情況下作出的：

options_en.A: Only with the employer's express authorisation
options_en.C: In the course of the employee's employment
options_en.E: Only if the employer approved the specific act

options_cn.A: 只在獲得僱主明確授權的情況下
options_cn.B: 只在僱主知悉的情況下
options_cn.E: 只在僱主批准該特定行為的情況下
